body:
Was this a mistake?
| Friend, we sent you this time-sensitive poll to gauge public support for the **No Kings Act** , and we’re still waiting for your response.

We’re confused... **Do you support Trump effectively becoming a King, or _was this a mistake?_**

We need 12,242 more responses for conclusive data — please, correct the record immediately: **[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18677%2E878179%2EBJB3cx)** | [YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18677%2E878179%2EBJB3cx)
---

Thank you SO much for your long awaited response,

_— The Voter Protection Project_

TO: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

*** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ***
* * *
Look, every day more and more Democrats call on Congress to pass the **No Kings Act** and __REVERSE__ the Supreme Court’s immunity decision...

But unless we - the PEOPLE - mount MAJOR pressure on Congress to take action, we’ll _lose our chance_ to put a check on Trump’s power.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Peter, we have some BIG plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9t47MhsOp5mBBVELa9_DDRxteRwPOV9U_Wg6hNcBxl-PhsHdW5_XCdP6yytzn71T3LMhEeHSJZydyHclX9Pl5ZPMkTC4xCnOspYwOXk-n8CO0MYaNx4wcwJNq1gKcqklY2Bxr3rS8uXjPlVj6lRXbwkVnxpFPaHALYFVXC00fFi0o%3D)
---
Peter, Republicans have some **BIG plans** for this year. It’s time to get started. In the coming months, we are going to work to **DISMANTLE** the radical and unelected administrative “Deep State.” We’re going to drastically reduce the size and scope of government. We’re going to return power back to “We the People.” _I’ve laid out 3 major political goals in order to make this happen:_
---
**[1\. Enact President Trump’s Agenda.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9t0TlroX9Z1PVXXPycWV7t_aG5NIalQlh68lp6cEB7ScKZnoffAhl9IneQ6YqWeJrShoCA-JuUiFkXJVGeKefo1Kd5bYq5bPslMj5uc5TBavGIdcmImTy0LGJTzB5tTigEo4EiuhDfgzHNiTy6ipZt75BNer-uI6IGaZnlGcfwTTk%3D)** We’re going to focus on securing the border, cutting regulations, unleashing American energy, and reducing your tax burden. Promises made, promises kept.

**[**2\. Win Special Elections.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9t6_BWmZmYXEYjjkNQZ8FWoiGc_AZ4LuSNc6QOE6G1zgmfeU9S895LrgfxjijIxfBce34HPD2J2Gp5Tln5yY9cYp-MhyWJwvEpwwbR27ppC0r-IxVX1eWebqgiwa8Hy0b6INCH8NET11vl0eJOsvphBdcQCIsaEjNl7H5azhzspiM%3D)** This is a crucial part of the plan necessary to protect our Republican majority in the House. When great leaders leave Congress to serve in the Trump Administration, their votes must quickly be replaced. We have special elections in Florida and New York _rapidly_ approaching. We cannot let the Democrats win these.
**
[3\. Build a Mighty War Chest.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9t79TvBUC_DjTgSf97DF2xrXQp_lzdcmNXsr2LCfzwqrOOBN4_whVhdcdBVbRdJhisxMjy9uZMG8fiGn2gs9vsqeebVMwuNtw0GKLbI_xVHU1gl14Yy72i6o0Ty13YaUvNfw7PZm3oExobfjjQZgsfX4nXjV_maKuSCULQ0xCvjMY%3D) **In order to support President Trump’s priorities, we need to protect and grow our Republican majority so he has a Republican Trifecta for ALL four years of his administration. We must defend vulnerable incumbents in the midterm elections and flip Democrat-held seats.
---
Do you support these goals, Peter? **[If so, will you please rush in support to ensure we reach our political goals? Your financial contribution of $15, $25, $30, or any amount will empower the America First Agenda and protect our Republican House majority for President Trump.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9tRJBDhz4EAlxfAtuJdNNxMO84qCsAhTCUmy-I79voqsrR_qt_IB5g0yQooWLvfRKbzH3pUt6GpJEfh0Xo06lNfkyac7UyqpWw8qXA6q7irEmX1J6z24TKLgaPJLkaHCDr8bLFyTttp9fe01SIAhI8gv0VVan8IdPzgNVwuAo_914%3D)**
---
[**HELP MEET OUR 2025 GOALS**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=70cd542ed03e49bf86fed643db844086&_e=7EE-68SVA8Q21PIl80TfSZ3Gu7h74xu3qFvge9eszoIaKY77E9WvfN14DdtYuV8j2O0dmnQPwxrD_jXL5cqiSA9ucOen0PjhSYeJRhDKpwKOcCxr6MnZs_CGQj5qQYcINE_ThE0N7XiP9t7PWgNRUAUmTVws_D2uazeVnNQjgGtc6j3IsKCutBghbsmsGWGNJS4ChOcrIORwluxFifbUoGECF_6WZBJ5f2044ZjQPxVwaz6RQ2-vW3KMiZIRsDGZg8uI7_nPyQtqrkgx4oDIuZpfMAnxF7q63sB4IzfNSoRCz8Y49wocyrT0ENiJx1aG57vZu5gcQSP_WojS_a5doEGFTg4p-GBUtKDEc3_JUh7meiyZo1gEC6O1vxdRjy9t27GDRDV3dbf-zcC5HBuikuAZIuwYXKqPMHEzq3ZCdxKkzkEscBcYej09bhWU1Du67LeJaUEO0anYiwbWoTgkTuExHcIWZXDk5JgUw8cVPSeaVufDkKFDu-U-xRxrfbYgecO743eKeKBvw0rpAmy4Zv7tnWghjCFbps9GlHdKE58%3D)
---
We can’t afford to keep doing business as usual. clean_body: | | | Peter, Republicans have some BIG plans for this year. It’s time to get started. In the coming months, we are going to work to DISMANTLE the radical and unelected administrative “Deep State.” We’re going to drastically reduce the size and scope of government. We’re going to return power back to “We the People.” I’ve laid out 3 major political goals in order to make this happen: We’re going to focus on securing the border, cutting regulations, unleashing American energy, and reducing your tax burden. Promises made, promises kept. This is a crucial part of the plan necessary to protect our Republican majority in the House. When great leaders leave Congress to serve in the Trump Administration, their votes must quickly be replaced. We have special elections in Florida and New York rapidly approaching. We cannot let the Democrats win these. In order to support President Trump’s priorities, we need to protect and grow our Republican majority so he has a Republican Trifecta for ALL four years of his administration. We must defend vulnerable incumbents in the midterm elections and flip Democrat-held seats. Do you support these goals, Peter? We can’t afford to keep doing business as usual. I know Republicans were elected to throw out the status quo and make real change happen. That’s why I’m ready to get to work and why I’m asking for your continued support, Peter. , we will be well on our way to reaching our goals and making 2025 the most politically successful year ever for Republicans. Thank you, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana |

subject: We Have No Choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump has a powerful message on the deportation of the millions of illegal immigrants who entered the U.S. under Joe Biden's reign:

**_["We have no choice."](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RxVtxBZ826u-9CCszAkLTg~~/AAVLBgA~~~)_**

And he's right.

Under Joe Biden, millions of illegal immigrants poured into our country with no consequences. and American families have paid the price.

We simply have no choice but to send those illegal immigrants back -- _and I 'm ready to work with President Trump to carry out the largest deportation operation in history._

_**[We're ready to deport millions of illegal immigrants and secure our border -- and I want to know if you're with us.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RxVtxBZ826u-9CCszAkLTg~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**_
**[Do you support President Trump's plan to deport millions of illegal immigrants?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RxVtxBZ826u-9CCszAkLTg~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrum8geap0r3hldde17gldeov9ju916tqcqr0kqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5t6d6ih03jqi22h9aqgs05u2mjbru6fmccto7s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqdvh42ccs4l4vo6fh97ka3cb2004p4un7pqdts0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2knorgqgbvhpm0vroetml89q1kat6gkag9kkifo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgtmmvhc1m066jgd51s63sne10g917hk1i7fc458_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s9jmeoj246h22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmuj63h9ahcvpgub188b7gc1pgr55mceqb1o6ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z18s6hf3q7rekvdr0gfjk836efshc7cg7h1in3d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt4a0ipi1cmfjgcn5te1u1j2ivg8d56h35p5aeo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34c5h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zht83b8052ddekmt909sd4igvgkpcric3kfu0j20_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34c5h2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk7ef3q5fc641lkbenjlfue9j7tiukk4cbi276o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34c5h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztb6vdlmg2gjce1jeafoo8s8v8ebqoqpnretu1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4o34c5h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. | Friend of Life, As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims. Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California. Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside. In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need. EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary. This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you. Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time. For Life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za62kbhgjjkjdncsnji172t1mfoafdmlp9c0aa88_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr5s6aludqn8bvj2lqnnu2202ibkjssscs9v3omg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsvoj76gq6no993212m6c7512k9ujli91of5ois0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9374hkh438urdj4m5ipeenf75ki17falmuj6hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk84m768j6e2ou0ok3tr49fiti6bvfcdlb5s89t8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s9jm1o3246h22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z26k2u1985da6p5ppne7t8cdfeida4qd2juadho8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge4p72clh2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk3cht8f7gda2h4dhroqpidpdbovis8pqnksjqj0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctge1oj4s9im49fg)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zk4mr8u9qt8i306hll8ag1lieb5lfpcncv5rb9p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco74cph2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdfopgmae1kliscmlk6o5qut63g8giku40vdo2r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco74cph2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0kf4p1ago3ghp6os89etiabmk6eu4ocr78q9sbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco74cph2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zq949mbk9e6bpodf4bi3goca5sp1hkcdnnp7b558_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco74cph2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5dhorq79ntmhie3i637kisfnggu1pamfpq1hh98_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco72chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ivnne2vvehlbh7kluevt0j96lv605catiibcio_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco72chh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znr3c5nkak4d780sljnbukpkcvvdpah97np0d1uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco72chh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqse7p31v5rp14ehbo181n36gapoai5akh340dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geco72chh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
We’re laying George Soros’ agenda to rest on January 31st.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhg8f03v5bbuqtdcl60gg4epu7q6sqe0po4mnkd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3geaor1cth2bs)
---
In memoriam: We’re laying George Soros’ agenda to rest on January 31st. The Soros agenda has reigned TERROR upon our nation for too long – and America’s children have been the victims. But now, we’re launching a tactical strike directly at the HEART of his corrupt influence operation... We uncovered the fact that people like Soros, Obama, Hillary Clinton, and even Bill Gates have funneled countless MILLIONS of dollars into dark money groups who infiltrate our nation’s schools. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi02s3748u0fpj524v77lv44vjil8bel7sboanb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfti6mabtdurbrkc1b1og0nvfj36j4lmv4k6tlro_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z105pbk5ubu8o4i04534sel9c6a0vs99se9e79q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm9gr8co8jjpabofpnohklc6fasdhhepekendn1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjapqo6cuso410eo3pgu4d78llph75hi0uej6gu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s9jm9pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs9juc471sus07bl6potmufba8e33ib1r2oh7oa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4cof8ts5pioagcf9a6fa7o7kogdbv82gg3tfsc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qucqccftc24fgejbknjjtdu45p1fgcggsaa72o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh71hrcb8t7id4ha46d6nbk9382ov1bm3slme7qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zngjueuo9p7l2fl941o2t8jc0s737om9umn521e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfggbjj0snp0r6oon98g2pjtr5u7h7rv3em7rgso_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge6pb2c9h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

ICYMI News

clean_body: As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. | Friend of Life, As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims. Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California. Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside. In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need. EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary. This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you. Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time. For Life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Congressman Eric Burlison
subject: Did you see the bill I introduced to protect LIFE?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
Life is the most sacred gift we’ve been given, and it’s worth fighting for.

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zuqrtal7bgvvp56kov1r0mtola6mouvkedv0gmbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge9oj2c3h2bs "Burlison for Congress")
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5848b0q6bef9nc0k8k387ls8nufitun5g9nvmj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge9oj2c3h2bs "Burlison for Congress")
**_Life is the most sacred gift we 've been given, and it's worth fighting for._**

That's why I introduced the Life at Conception Act--**_a bill that DECLARES the right to life, as guaranteed by our Constitution, is vested in each human being at every stage of life._**

**Let me be clear:**

\- This bill ensures life is **PROTECTED** from the moment of conception.

\- It does **NOT** authorize the prosecution of women for the loss of their unborn child.

** But you won't hear that from the Radical Left. **

**They will twist the truth, claiming this bill punishes women and doctors when that couldn 't be further from reality.**

Patriot, we cannot let their lies go unchallenged. This bill is about one thing: **PROTECTING LIFE.**

This is a **HISTORIC** bill, and you have the chance to be part of a **TRULY** historic day!

**I need to know:**
**DO YOU STAND WITH ME IN SUPPORTING THE LIFE AT CONCEPTION ACT?**
**[YES](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5u7h9olhi2sll144r5ji7tqiu5h0p1egcto6su8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge9oj2c3h2bs)**** [ NO](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu6tcc7rlsteui4kpotic245mplq5q6pmnjo3olo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c3ge9oj2c3h2bs)**
This fight won't be easy. The Radical Left will stop at nothing to block this bill. _**They will spread misinformation, drown us out with propaganda, and try to silence every voice that stands for life.**_

But with patriots like you, we can break through the noise. **We can spread the truth and defend the most vulnerable among us. **

For Life,
Congressman Eric Burlison

clean_body: Life is the most sacred gift we’ve been given, and it’s worth fighting for. "Burlison for Congress" "Burlison for Congress" Life is the most sacred gift we 've been given, and it's worth fighting for. That's why I introduced the Life at Conception Act--a bill that DECLARES the right to life, as guaranteed by our Constitution, is vested in each human being at every stage of life. Let me be clear: \- This bill ensures life is PROTECTED from the moment of conception. \- It does NOT authorize the prosecution of women for the loss of their unborn child. But you won't hear that from the Radical Left. They will twist the truth, claiming this bill punishes women and doctors when that couldn 't be further from reality. Patriot, we cannot let their lies go unchallenged. This bill is about one thing: PROTECTING LIFE. This is a HISTORIC bill, and you have the chance to be part of a TRULY historic day! I need to know: DO YOU STAND WITH ME IN SUPPORTING THE LIFE AT CONCEPTION ACT? This fight won't be easy. The Radical Left will stop at nothing to block this bill. They will spread misinformation, drown us out with propaganda, and try to silence every voice that stands for life. But with patriots like you, we can break through the noise. We can spread the truth and defend the most vulnerable among us. For Life, Congressman Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. | | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the **[Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20015/6374453/ce0d8ae0114dd964050919f2e715c604568b4696/65eccca76eb6cb894139f6fa7d5a86b2765dc1ab) **—the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20015/6374453/ce0d8ae0114dd964050919f2e715c604568b4696/65eccca76eb6cb894139f6fa7d5a86b2765dc1ab)
---
Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: **> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. **> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. **> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20015/6374453/ce0d8ae0114dd964050919f2e715c604568b4696/65eccca76eb6cb894139f6fa7d5a86b2765dc1ab) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. **> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. **Limited Stock Alert:** These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. **Special Offer Just for You:** For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever. [**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20015/6374453/ce0d8ae0114dd964050919f2e715c604568b4696/65eccca76eb6cb894139f6fa7d5a86b2765dc1ab)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T910f103a-f5da-44d5-9c21-8340d9a5a4f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, Donald Trump – our first CONVICTED FELON to serve as president – got away with even more crimes committed while trying to overturn Joe Biden’s 100% valid election. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9fd1313-81b5-44fa-9463-fd95f64ea0fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We NEED to know if you think that Trump deserves to be impeached for his criminal behavior. Can you respond below and let us know? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1790482-a1dc-4585-93f3-bcc704d46ae1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T386911cb-48b5-4f28-b7e2-0ac61a619682/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) During his first term, Donald Trump was almost removed from office TWICE – but the GOP managed to block both attempts. If Democrats can take back control of the House and Senate, we can get the power to remove Trump from office once and for all. But we want to know if you think that Democrats should make impeachment a priority. Can you answer this one question poll and let us know your thoughts? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T305caf5d-20bd-4515-989d-b558b14f3a4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cfb5836-b163-44a9-aa4b-a36a8787b077/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your response! – Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9635bd0f-cca2-4e1b-8d84-6115bd39c6a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Trump Victory AR15
subject: “Morning in America” Again: Celebrate With the Victory AR-15
body:
The sun rises on a new era...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af)
---
| | |
---
_January 26th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
The sun rises on a new era... Like Reagan before him, President Trump stood in the Capitol Rotunda yesterday... And just like that historic morning in 1981, hope has returned to America. The storm clouds have parted. The darkness is lifting. And once again... it's **Morning in America.** Yesterday, our 45th President became our 47th President. The first President since Reagan to reclaim the White House and restore American greatness. To commemorate this historic "Second Morning in America" moment... Patriots across the country are claiming something special: **The**** __**[**_MAGA Victory AR-15_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af)

---
[**Click here to see it now >>**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af) Each rifle tells the story of Trump's triumphant return: **✓ Custom "45/47th President" laser-engraved artwork**! **✓ American Flag Victory-themed Cerakote with Presidential seal**! **✓ Built to presidential-level standards!** Like Reagan's morning... this rifle represents more than just metal and machinery. It represents the restoration of American strength, pride, and excellence. Every detail of the [ _MAGA Victory AR-15_](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af) has been crafted to presidential standards: **✓ Full-auto-tested reliability** (you get a LIFETIME WARRANTY!) **✓ Proof-tested for “sniper rifle” accuracy** (You get a Sub-MOA precision guarantee!) **✓ Hand-built by master gunsmiths** in Alabama (made in the USA baby!) **Plus****:** You get a **FREE 2-Day LIVE Rifle Tactical Training Course**($1,500 value) and 5 MORE free bonuses! Celebrate This New Morning in America: **> > **[**Reserve Your MAGA Victory AR-15 Now****!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af) **WARNING****:** Don’t get pushed to the back of the line. Extended wait times apply the longer you wait to reserve your hand-built, one-of-one, collector’s rifle because only 20 rifles go into production at any one time. **Thank You.** P.S. When your grandchildren ask about the morning America came back... make sure you can show them [**THIS**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20016/6374453/0e9ab90bbd93b6fb1e0e068a98be4775a1c14358/ca121676784f222bff3fa34da4834ad4aca117af) ← Check availability while you still can.

name: Troy Downing
subject: Change is coming!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m ready to help turn our government around

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._zNj3zs32LQ)
---
Peter, with President Trump back in the White House, change is FINALLY coming to Washington, and the one I’m looking forward to the most is some **FISCAL RESPONSIBILITY.**

For decades, politicians in both parties have run up our debt with no accountability. _**THAT CHANGES NOW**_. With the new Department of Government Efficiency, we’re ready to make fundamental changes to make a difference in our government. I’m ready to work with President Trump and the DOGE, but I also want to hear from you. **[**Will you take a moment to answer my fiscal responsibility survey to let us know what YOU want to see cut?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._FASaXleEg)**
---
[ TAKE THE SURVEY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-4vQ)
---
Thank you,Congressman Troy Downing

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6K85RyXoInChNsxQKpB1lg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpeKuuP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpdmUtc3RhdGUtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNzA1TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGl2ZXN0YXRlc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEyNlcDc3BjQgpnjgoUlmftoD-LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6K85RyXoInChNsxQKpB1lg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpeKuuP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpdmUtc3RhdGUtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNzA1TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGl2ZXN0YXRlc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEyNlcDc3BjQgpnjgoUlmftoD-LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6K85RyXoInChNsxQKpB1lg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpeKuuP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpdmUtc3RhdGUtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNzA1TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGl2ZXN0YXRlc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEyNlcDc3BjQgpnjgoUlmftoD-LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6K85RyXoInChNsxQKpB1lg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpeKuuP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpdmUtc3RhdGUtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNzA1TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGl2ZXN0YXRlc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEyNlcDc3BjQgpnjgoUlmftoD-LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation

subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=295762004d184f318bc7fae5ba525a85&_e=pHjIUeMoRnE_XtPIxLqn7sHO9-19QQc80ytH-Fm_YMX5RFdgLuWKd85jY2IMpLAy3s9qQcNI-tcHOAa9GXTeICeRcKf9_6CnxLXPQx7vDQmdhId5MQqu0jBaMyh2XAo_CnG9nqjcoEm6DKNO44aNCGDX1dWdLKOqTIrmIxCCNgtQM1lAY5bD_6WYqq9fSypw54_7OUkAxy6s5RawlY562a39b23MCKQ5cGJC1rDB3_pmgUONM7LD2xhxBaIsaQ2akA6Bggi9tpbpUX3lmFIslDJONHH_apuHuiOSnYpn9PApTNi0X6Y2C2lyDvZUb9j9fifl0CEDyVYYENHGn2QkS_dNfnpXvqfTki7efDsgpltF_YDecCO4EPMuuHxoiBacfszOgfBEIWK354Puh5BX1BG_pB_BvuAQz-firooNTrA%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=295762004d184f318bc7fae5ba525a85&_e=pHjIUeMoRnE_XtPIxLqn7sHO9-19QQc80ytH-Fm_YMX5RFdgLuWKd85jY2IMpLAy3s9qQcNI-tcHOAa9GXTeICeRcKf9_6CnxLXPQx7vDQmdhId5MQqu0jBaMyh2XAo_CnG9nqjcoEm6DKNO44aNCGDX1dWdLKOqTIrmIxCCNgtQM1lAY5bD_6WYqq9fSypw54_7OUkAxy6s5RawlY562a39b23MCKQ5cGJC1rDB3_pmgUONM7LD2xhxBaIsaQ2acMiKVHDHmwk9y4EktSy8HiPG5Y_CoWDIm7EHLzrcHrG0n6I5RAIvVXVkUw8YHxw9NBxW9tWADInqxH3wKOh0PbVSNMUwYuHHHFTZSt_oApuBLZNkD4OhmzA0q_JrB88QDH2sD9FC3n2Ex6FoFt37yOcn9h43WIdU3erxBSflemc%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=295762004d184f318bc7fae5ba525a85&_e=pHjIUeMoRnE_XtPIxLqn7sHO9-19QQc80ytH-Fm_YMX5RFdgLuWKd85jY2IMpLAy3s9qQcNI-tcHOAa9GXTeICeRcKf9_6CnxLXPQx7vDQmdhId5MQqu0jBaMyh2XAo_CnG9nqjcoEm6DKNO44aNCGDX1dWdLKOqTIrmIxCCNgtQM1lAY5bD_6WYqq9fSypw54_7OUkAxy6s5RawlY562a39b23MCKQ5cGJC1rDB3_pmgUONM7LD2xhxBaIsaQ2aSb0E6tFNNEDSdMA2qXckGOVU9hG38ienjugbr-AKzVrPr55t71GP5i87pvc1SRzvnpj_VgrIzdX8AU9iGcYxwwYb-OALPhVi_XLDhKotE7CsbIsPxv-5AtnKbzZ_T5I5t9OY3onss2l858s5stdTszbNF5H5ykmnzTbdtoaIP1g%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=295762004d184f318bc7fae5ba525a85&_e=pHjIUeMoRnE_XtPIxLqn7sHO9-19QQc80ytH-Fm_YMX5RFdgLuWKd85jY2IMpLAy3s9qQcNI-tcHOAa9GXTeICeRcKf9_6CnxLXPQx7vDQmdhId5MQqu0jBaMyh2XAo_CnG9nqjcoEm6DKNO44aNCGDX1dWdLKOqTIrmIxCCNgtQM1lAY5bD_6WYqq9fSypw54_7OUkAxy6s5RawlY562a39b23MCKQ5cGJC1rDB3_pmgUONM7LD2xhxBaIsaQ2avaIoehVduIHpFBOgsbiOjM9GAcd54mtDLpRYFt4BZ-rdutQwh_Mv7e7dGbLAXGFi4ykMN4AckEUC87lSiTghIaaYaEMjPtLGZPTnb4IdiTiDIGgdq7EyLWuT92z8Lq4IxogeWvg_8jm4O_fDx5BN7U_hGSUTt1nXJRNbyMNCZho%3D)**

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon! In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them... Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians. : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback. Plus they’re IP54 water resistant. Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount... While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and free shipping! P.S. body:

She will oversee border security, immigration, emergency response, and other duties.

The National Archives is [on the hunt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhSAUxvGngU0DBwQZGLq43a4dDReO19NwxSjV-PaN3Tt_yffL_-sxPgJlWl6f4Y2-TmUEAV0jZANmTIHyNWqe_IQIqDh6aZXtnRRW89l3KSQnNNo-am2DfVoUnbFP1ffOqaA4-ftNSDBSglOmnWQyKGMH2qSpd5ZpgYlq2drvQkudccpXOXBrY3nz7Oda152pDwYDg-E8z3Yt6x7pnhkMFeO8lFxeF4Mh_mw7HdgsoVJZQm7CFmc6cGcw8M2n9aScaTe3-XoHyn9G_a_58PAbAAD__0JsWWk) for folks with a very special set of skills—reading cursive writing. ## Senate Confirms Noem, Hegseth
The Senate confirmed South Dakota governor Kristi Noem yesterday as Secretary of [Homeland Security](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9ugzAQx_Gngc3IPsAmg4cubOnaETn4HK71n8hcgvL2Fd27faSTTl_9vq7L1VGkfP90CS2HsoCEUUglQC_eUXwvQ-ttQATsW7TK9Ga6KGmGdrMjSoU3tU4hDFKb0MM0wajVZLRxzpiW7PlNKtBKwaXXXVBeo1pHGLQP08U0g0RPXGr3XSjzhiG-ywtrt5bURrsxP_am_2hgbmA-jqNbb3vGYz_vDcwnG5h_Ku1MIhdMguszPcRWEkaXvdhxfVbi94mK7Oqp7BjFWnKgmhxTyeJVGBuY22r946AYaddn2z05in8t_N82Lwu_AQAA___rzmjS) by a 59-34 vote. She will oversee border security, immigration, emergency response, and other duties. The Senate also [confirmed Pete Hegseth](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1jm8OO4oLiNu9x2S4vAIWaFIYKjWHn7lbffbkYjzYy-r_t2dymn8vzvDrQU6wYTaD4JDmYLLuXPpoZgIyKgHNCKWc63RUyzGnYb5UOjXrzU-vaYVUScnHJgAgQPenFDslfbJMAIAYs0YxTBoPAalAnxtsxMTRgS1TZ-11Rox5g_9Y1t9PUYst2JXp3JfwxWBut5nqN_9IJnv3IG6yUZrC8k5Ds-O9LOfS0xtcNRqoW_KyHvWBwhDxix9Mv6huTah8E6NBteZ8o5dXOdeR4u5d9x-gvG28JPAAAA__9gPGOP) as the nation’s Secretary of Defense late Friday after Vice President JD Vance cast the deciding vote to break a 50-50 tie. Hegseth had a distinguished military career with tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He has degrees from Harvard and Princeton and worked in veterans’ advocacy before becoming a Fox News host. Former GOP leader Mitch McConnell and Republican Senators Susan Collins and Lisa Murkowski [voted against the nomination](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtCAUBeCnwQ4DqKAFxZ_8sZvNdlsaBi56NwhGbmbi22_cfuuTc_LlfD2Wh8OEef1wO1iKZVFCDVxIrvQSHKZr6ZtgI4CCrgErTWfGSQrTN5t9Oq-V7h1Mg_Fg4GniNHg9wBSE6H1s0N5rQiotpZo63UYZNEg_qF6HOE6G9QICUjnb74KZNojpKi84W1_2JtmN6Kis-8fUzNTsnj7Du7ZruWOm5s-SkNBXpuYK2RHwo2CFwF-FgPuSI54732CtQBtP4AI_IJNbS-YB6oEEd5XKebFuxsC6_1KOQo9iFM1pw_HGlLDqm7nuDtMvi_666WXVTwAAAP__0Zxq6Q), along with all Senate Democrats.
## Trump Halts Foreign Aid, Ramps Up Deportations
Following an executive order by President Trump, Secretary of State Marco Rubio ordered [a halt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb8GOiO8BgOFizR0lzYl8nnXx0YGI9t36P4-IlWadE8a6Wk0X7flZjnw_vi0G5ni4wIt9KKVAvSClsN76Wo0nghI1WTkoIZxku3Q1auBcaReKak7dUd0g5du7BG17XvQ3WBrNtdbK0FLCZPSjZeoSboeOo1-nIaqawm5xNR8R97LSj6844tS4-JWB7OWcuRKfVQwVzCf59nsd7fTmS9ewXzEwIVd_jPFhSuYN5tcFOl55yhiQkpZrDYUYcMWcxHPLHxMxI9dWEaR3G7lOIFq62TwODkEzvrSe2yWw69O-S_Py8BPAAAA__8EaGig) to almost all U.S. foreign assistance on Friday. The move pauses new obligations and disbursements pending reviews “for programmatic efficiency and consistency” with U.S. foreign policy, within 90 days of the order. Meanwhile, ICE agents launched an early morning sweep for illegal immigrants in Los Angeles yesterday. According to the [New York Post](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb0TwTCAeGLp4S9eOFoZH8ioMFpCk-fvK3bsd6UpHR_frulwdJcq3T7eh7bEsIODMheSgl-AovRc1BBsRAccBrTSjuUxSGDXcrTdxVcqHFYwSysd48Q6Cnlaj17NSciB72IQELSVMoz5FGTRKfwalQ7xMhimBgXqpp-9Cud8xpnd5Yj35sg3J3nvfGxs_GMwM5vzeS-vHxGA-xAxmIQ8-6NF4xldjMPf62PbGySOvjkLjsVTuK22UXeIb3arLvXH82V0OjVPuhSfHYB6qDfuLUqKmj7Tb5ij9pfT_rnla-A0AAP__hGtlZQ), California's detention centers are expected to fill up so quickly that federal agents are searching for additional space. In an interview with ABC News, border czar Tom Homan said the administration is [planning to use military aircraft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu6yAUxvGnwRsWHAw2A8OVrryl6tbRInCcnAobC2gi9-mrdO_8SZ9--n9clounRPvtzW_o2poXEKC5kBzMEj2lcxm66FZEQNWhk6MaJyvFOHR3N-pBSdR2nUYFwoLWRuM0Wiulj8aHjtzrTUgwUoJVpl9lNCiDhsHEdbIjGwRGarn0n5n2dsc1nfmBpQ9565K7t3ZUpv4xmBnM_hp2fNb-ll8zg_k9J2oUKoO5la_t4NdcIhYevn3hDVOq3F8D3yhR8-XkR_I7Vh7xyKUxmGvL5WRqpsjUfyknYbQWqisuHk9Kiap5AW-bp_QLan8Fejj4CQAA__-ymmch) every day to carry out deportations, noting that ICE officers are free to arrest any of the estimated 11 million illegal immigrants, not just convicted criminals or other public safety threats.
## Longshot American Wins Australian Open
American tennis player Madison Keys pulled off a shocking upset [to win the Australian Open](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OtCAUxvGrwQ4Dhw-dguJt6OZttzREjuPZRTDCjvHuN26_9ZM8-eX_8ZyegRLl1_-woWtLmUCA4UJysFMMlK5Jd9EtiICqQycHNYwPKQbdrQ6VsBExhlEtRg5Wz0Ypo6MVEOIgoCN3vwkJVkp4KNsvMlqUswFt4zI-BqYFRmrl6D8L5bbikq7yxqOfy9Ylt7a2V6b-MfAM_HmePdY93yMD3zBnqgx8beW4GPiJgafIwGtljBXjyMCHDQ-aQ-ZbiFRL5l94VX5Srjx813aERCHzsmPm8xq2nUquK-3d4eJ-UkpU7Y18bYHSL6r9Fent4CcAAP__hOdpfQ) on Saturday, defeating top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka in three sets. Keys, the 19th seed, played her best tennis to win 6-3, 2-6, 7-5 in just over two hours against the two-time reigning champion. Sabalenka responded to the loss [by smashing her racket](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuAyEQheHTQGeLmcEDFBRRpO2cJkXKFVoGmwgba5c48e0jp0_7iu_p_zjOx1RbvZ7e0kXiKH1Gg4edgR3ynFNtj9nqHIsICmmJ4Mj5AMZZfY4SFnSOiWwKxAwkLEsisp79UpzoGp-aAWQADMT7ApkFlgNazsUHp6yRXEdf95-9XsdZSnv0u6z7pV90i-cxbpuiF4WTwunnuSqc3m99HdurXIesCqdtpPG1KZzAewLDHhAYgw0USK8x375ra3Xj59npkmr7w8d_sfeIvwEAAP__qs9S8g) and briefly leaving the court before returning. Once a rising star in tennis after she reached the U.S. Open Final in 2017, Keys acknowledged that [she needed “lots of therapy”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvozAQBOBfA50RXsCGwsU1dLn2SrTB6-CLsTl7E8S_P-Xpta-e0ejT_LktN_TBx8dv3MmwSwu0MIhWClCLRR-upa-tcURAXU1G6k6Pk2x1X2_GgRrW1o5oEce-01K6dlKT7R2BHjpde_NZayUoKWHqVOOkVSTXAXpl3Tjpqm_Jek65-Zt85I1cuNKbcrOmvQ5mYz5K1f2qYK5gPs-zYYrRl09cwXzHQsFHqmDGzH4NVCqY_70Sk0hO8EbC4iV2tL6kKJ50FVHwKiIkLt-NjMclAlnBSeCrcMbgMYp0UBT3TPjkLafXY6uzscfpQ_BFfdiPHX34YvJPt70N_A8AAP__179y3g) to let go of expectations and negative emotions and unlock her best tennis.

She will oversee border security, immigration, emergency response, and other duties. The Senate also as the nation’s Secretary of Defense late Friday after Vice President JD Vance cast the deciding vote to break a 50-50 tie. Hegseth had a distinguished military career with tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He has degrees from Harvard and Princeton and worked in veterans’ advocacy before becoming a Fox News host. Former GOP leader Mitch McConnell and Republican Senators Susan Collins and Lisa Murkowski , along with all Senate Democrats. Trump Halts Foreign Aid, Ramps Up Deportations Following an executive order by President Trump, Secretary of State Marco Rubio ordered to almost all U.S. foreign assistance on Friday. The move pauses new obligations and disbursements pending reviews “for programmatic efficiency and consistency” with U.S. foreign policy, within 90 days of the order. Meanwhile, ICE agents launched an early morning sweep for illegal immigrants in Los Angeles yesterday. According to the , California's detention centers are expected to fill up so quickly that federal agents are searching for additional space. In an interview with ABC News, border czar Tom Homan said the administration is every day to carry out deportations, noting that ICE officers are free to arrest any of the estimated 11 million illegal immigrants, not just convicted criminals or other public safety threats. Longshot American Wins Australian Open American tennis player Madison Keys pulled off a shocking upset on Saturday, defeating top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka in three sets. Keys, the 19th seed, played her best tennis to win 6-3, 2-6, 7-5 in just over two hours against the two-time reigning champion. Sabalenka responded to the loss and briefly leaving the court before returning. Once a rising star in tennis after she reached the U.S. Open Final in 2017, Keys acknowledged that to let go of expectations and negative emotions and unlock her best tennis. Saturday's Results: Which teams will make it to the Super Bowl? 1. Eagles - Chiefs: 39% 2. Commanders - Chiefs: 23% 3. Eagles - Bills: 21% 4. Commanders - Bills: 17% | | Daily Quote | “I think if more people do it and more people talk about it, then it just kind of becomes the norm.” —, on beating the stigma of talking openly about mental health. | Today's Trivia What are you if you're "ambisinister"? | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS - From House GOP
subject: Of all the emails you've received today, this is the MOST important!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G6GCA3IGe6hPsyp-RlGBPQ~~/AARclAA~~ "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**
| | [CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/M3D2Hx72TKLNWTTt84b5qg~~/AARclAA~_Z-OUVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS")

---
| [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G6GCA3IGe6hPsyp-RlGBPQ~~/AARclAA~~ "CONTRIBUTE MORE")
---

Listen -

_This deadline was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

**THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET! **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21.

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these.

Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

_**[Our deadline is closing in! We're PLEADING for your help right here and right now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G6GCA3IGe6hPsyp-RlGBPQ~~/AARclAA~~ "Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now.")**_

Thanks for all you do.

**- SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS - **
_From House Republicans_

THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE YET! Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21. Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these. Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation. ~ "Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now." Thanks for all you do. - SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS - From House Republicans | | | ~~ "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my ~~ "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | ~~ "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. ~ Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~
