name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a22f7bef83084db889820e8e13814a1a&_e=FEdbhwmGE4MbDYpLaM0HhVPY1x8C6XazEIZc9Fifu-PVuOFRR0ab8kQ-EihmPC8UiK-HTctg_deHhd6f4gRmJZ-RZCE3sbMwJHdHHKsN35VAXatm4mfwnpB7aaSQeDPigJLM6sWJnaxZRU3KdCbZuW2NZjEvorcZn7q3mixYrLPM-cKvcpggeCgvorwNqA0Arc8URcxaIGLDjAweuqnxG-D7LIpvhBktsW7uErMGKY9wJ8oiIwTLXs0r5OQyqNEgVwWUSxmqHPTdz6J6oYm3PL5Z_NNO58cXeUG4lEIOitJcoJt213ZOvmjjc8aVOYhfLVLUpKBfoHnes56qYjxBSImHf727JNF8NhIX9DpuO6FZWWooQbGb1X7SGLFbFRgwC62rSpFX7m41Rzsj7iWZlj3UuX2g5DcTkOrF8zKsPUQ%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a22f7bef83084db889820e8e13814a1a&_e=FEdbhwmGE4MbDYpLaM0HhVPY1x8C6XazEIZc9Fifu-PVuOFRR0ab8kQ-EihmPC8UiK-HTctg_deHhd6f4gRmJZ-RZCE3sbMwJHdHHKsN35VAXatm4mfwnpB7aaSQeDPigJLM6sWJnaxZRU3KdCbZuW2NZjEvorcZn7q3mixYrLPM-cKvcpggeCgvorwNqA0Arc8URcxaIGLDjAweuqnxG-D7LIpvhBktsW7uErMGKY9wJ8oiIwTLXs0r5OQyqNEgl8bE3FoRFoNQKlBG_VMIBgqptRjXGW-f-V7_l4F7qge3D7upCtuUcKxroW-zwu_jpStdcnmj9XTSjlZ7DQI4imwDHIf0CPCGDGrwZz8UHuDjmVttiIIEhSm3DG8XrDKKmwVQkV02_30VDOMxpOp1DBrnfYinWw5OViADYE7FUkk%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a22f7bef83084db889820e8e13814a1a&_e=FEdbhwmGE4MbDYpLaM0HhVPY1x8C6XazEIZc9Fifu-PVuOFRR0ab8kQ-EihmPC8UiK-HTctg_deHhd6f4gRmJZ-RZCE3sbMwJHdHHKsN35VAXatm4mfwnpB7aaSQeDPigJLM6sWJnaxZRU3KdCbZuW2NZjEvorcZn7q3mixYrLPM-cKvcpggeCgvorwNqA0Arc8URcxaIGLDjAweuqnxG-D7LIpvhBktsW7uErMGKY9wJ8oiIwTLXs0r5OQyqNEgak9v9vcAuhQW_aTdHt5sFppAigSw6L7oajwZ_Gj5cF4hky01MK9oPXrrrLosfiT8ssaeyFJlgUuwcENAUZETTU5Oq8wgo7W6vfk-uEPt4aGWOc15FkrwCj470RguSlXn_Pp204CQNDvBUXtKL0e3E_BhHgbOqGXAV-iiHAuM85I%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a22f7bef83084db889820e8e13814a1a&_e=FEdbhwmGE4MbDYpLaM0HhVPY1x8C6XazEIZc9Fifu-PVuOFRR0ab8kQ-EihmPC8UiK-HTctg_deHhd6f4gRmJZ-RZCE3sbMwJHdHHKsN35VAXatm4mfwnpB7aaSQeDPigJLM6sWJnaxZRU3KdCbZuW2NZjEvorcZn7q3mixYrLPM-cKvcpggeCgvorwNqA0Arc8URcxaIGLDjAweuqnxG-D7LIpvhBktsW7uErMGKY9wJ8oiIwTLXs0r5OQyqNEgtQfaeIUEKQzJHSKBSmhy1sXcDJL0NZ07vJdtXCm65kI-8QYAsMhFk-ra7G1l14nwNrnQiVK16K7XB00dgX40KM8jbyp3pIwQ2uGHLksC-p3ZjT3WDTz50Q_2vID0giKMklpI6EGi3I3PCixXU0ZPL2KIohIYRBNaDCXQtgwdDqE%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=a22f7bef83084db889820e8e13814a1a&_t=gIM7I3Z5XsA7C0E7Yrsgl0E05jlG1dh-5cr4BKhtzsn4WKGbKds_VaxdwsDbVn0pvxGtitJWVJRPtT5_1hgRIBubEf_CUPeG8rXpg_LRbzwVfBPwANBGWUdHnY8icT5C)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b565f0e402f466ab66e573ec5ab88bf&_e=ZCu2Pp6CHjN0YYYzhqIbVhu9oVY9FoMh1psA9QJXhnNn1VdlaNpKJ1DZml-372Xeuo5rJJlJ0U8Pq8ZxLd_x0qR3tT5_dCF9Ddpg-PFEYZNc8mNNZ67wwKuWj_8LJ96ljYLw2Xy1za3Q1eY5n8gVciTFUzqxPFN8EUqyr80LtznWofAdUsLx2k6gse8ZZyASfvA-AQLfQBe2l14Jwzz1pR0PjUTyzh9BMzb9UCzpC5sp2UaEhSIn4VsRPli0x0U0XAMFz96_4zuY2oySgl2-Bkq3mPsLx6v-SfipkhRPAiNe4xihrf5jFmtxFMF_pD59f5WUxAvipqnufXD-KIW07jnXGyrSkaeA5hDf5FxIpluEr1Fv7wJn6Fo-E59u-I2o)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b565f0e402f466ab66e573ec5ab88bf&_e=ZCu2Pp6CHjN0YYYzhqIbVhu9oVY9FoMh1psA9QJXhnNn1VdlaNpKJ1DZml-372Xeuo5rJJlJ0U8Pq8ZxLd_x0qR3tT5_dCF9Ddpg-PFEYZNc8mNNZ67wwKuWj_8LJ96ljYLw2Xy1za3Q1eY5n8gVciTFUzqxPFN8EUqyr80LtznWofAdUsLx2k6gse8ZZyASfvA-AQLfQBe2l14Jwzz1pcCxpPTm8in1PbhcflPu4FaUtk2lBY39sVaAZyKCpcugJfwSw1DWTfO2f22CTxUJusqf4CSo3D9AV-MR83rbZth0YmZmCbr99-qmiwHWaSm5X4emW7e4tJdki_2X4KiHJ0R5deUxMGOZakxoRJ-NZS65qP466HFcQHu0EhQbl2Qe)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b565f0e402f466ab66e573ec5ab88bf&_e=ZCu2Pp6CHjN0YYYzhqIbVhu9oVY9FoMh1psA9QJXhnNn1VdlaNpKJ1DZml-372Xeuo5rJJlJ0U8Pq8ZxLd_x0qR3tT5_dCF9Ddpg-PFEYZNc8mNNZ67wwKuWj_8LJ96ljYLw2Xy1za3Q1eY5n8gVciTFUzqxPFN8EUqyr80LtznWofAdUsLx2k6gse8ZZyASfvA-AQLfQBe2l14Jwzz1pXTfl8Y11Ztu3taeIZhC5iQ67m5sNsjC6DkIgwY5bcU-A1RVCvrrs1qFraxgqO1Nzge3-OsstF5jLakEjp4qe209n8YTO9MDQYKmBdkgvxPrOBm6v60q5i6E7qZmu8V-niWv81E6LZiRMtAXBUTpZnu3RhitCMdg6YScxqEwQj28)**

name: History Facts
subject: Australia declared war on this animal
body:
Australia is known for its unique wildlife, not all of which is friendly. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68d7lmc5ziy7r3ki9zkpi1g9owhxdzot7e2sojalcwwtkxzbvv2rd7072jd0gon44uvo1n4t67dxtivolrgtlbcxbg6xravuu9zvf918t7cyfu4o2hslc4319pt5a7su99bxd4iotuypwdjb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [In 1932, Australia declared a “war” against emus (and lost).](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A ustralia is known for its unique wildlife, not all of which is friendly. In [1932](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), the country received a harsh reminder of that when a drought caused some 20,000 emus to move inland in search of water during their breeding season, disrupting farmers’ crops in the process. The ostrich-like birds had already had their classification downgraded from “native species” to “vermin” despite being endemic to Australia and appearing on its coat of arms alongside the kangaroo, and this mass migration made them public enemy No. 1. The government sent in World War I veterans to assist the beleaguered farmers, and though they were outfitted with machine guns, they soon found themselves overwhelmed by their flightless foes. Emus are fairly imposing, to be fair — among all bird species, only ostriches and cassowaries are larger.
---
“The machine-gunners’ dreams of point-blank fire into serried masses of Emus were soon dissipated,” [observed D.L. Serventy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), an Australian ornithologist. “The Emu command had evidently ordered guerrilla tactics, and its unwieldy army soon split up into innumerable small units that made use of the military equipment uneconomic. A crestfallen field force therefore withdrew from the combat area after about a month.” In other words, the emus emerged victorious in what’s now known as the Great Emu War. The birds were simply too much trouble to get rid of, and though they suffered heavy casualties, they still thrive Down Under.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Emus lie awake for a while before falling asleep.
Anyone with a pet knows that cats, dogs, and other animals tend to fall asleep right away (lucky them). Not the emu, which spends up to 20 minutes getting into the right position before finally nodding off. That’s according to [_The Sleep of the Emu_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqp2wq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) author Klaus Immelmann, a zoologist who observed emus and ostriches at the Frankfurt Zoological Garden over the course of 10 consecutive nights. Though they get ready for bed as soon as the sun goes down, and exhibit “preliminary drowsiness” described by Immelmann as “remarkably suggestive of a late-at-night reader in a comfortable armchair,” emus often jerk back awake just before falling asleep and rise as many as eight times a night.

clean_body: Australia is known for its unique wildlife, not all of which is friendly. | A ustralia is known for its unique wildlife, not all of which is friendly. In , the country received a harsh reminder of that when a drought caused some 20,000 emus to move inland in search of water during their breeding season, disrupting farmers’ crops in the process. The ostrich-like birds had already had their classification downgraded from “native species” to “vermin” despite being endemic to Australia and appearing on its coat of arms alongside the kangaroo, and this mass migration made them public enemy No. 1. The government sent in World War I veterans to assist the beleaguered farmers, and though they were outfitted with machine guns, they soon found themselves overwhelmed by their flightless foes. Emus are fairly imposing, to be fair — among all bird species, only ostriches and cassowaries are larger. “The machine-gunners’ dreams of point-blank fire into serried masses of Emus were soon dissipated,” , an Australian ornithologist. “The Emu command had evidently ordered guerrilla tactics, and its unwieldy army soon split up into innumerable small units that made use of the military equipment uneconomic. A crestfallen field force therefore withdrew from the combat area after about a month.” In other words, the emus emerged victorious in what’s now known as the Great Emu War. The birds were simply too much trouble to get rid of, and though they suffered heavy casualties, they still thrive Down Under. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Maximum sprinting speed (in miles per hour) of the emu 30 | | “Megadiverse” countries known for their biodiversity, including Australia 17 | “Megadiverse” countries known for their biodiversity, including Australia 17 | | Australia’s emu population ~725,000 | | Toes on an emu’s foot 3 | Toes on an emu’s foot 3 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Emus lie awake for a while before falling asleep. Anyone with a pet knows that cats, dogs, and other animals tend to fall asleep right away (lucky them). Not the emu, which spends up to 20 minutes getting into the right position before finally nodding off. That’s according to author Klaus Immelmann, a zoologist who observed emus and ostriches at the Frankfurt Zoological Garden over the course of 10 consecutive nights. Though they get ready for bed as soon as the sun goes down, and exhibit “preliminary drowsiness” described by Immelmann as “remarkably suggestive of a late-at-night reader in a comfortable armchair,” emus often jerk back awake just before falling asleep and rise as many as eight times a night. Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: Lila Rose, Live Action
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f040af068e042d981cf256ae66fb3f5&_e=zw8oUL0X6QDDkkVE51VePVF3gNvk8nCHh-Xx6u5VvYKwhE7VwMHVXPlfYS4KbJFnIc1Vu3uHMg_fJzdChen_C3JeySzJLsb8DYWYD_DmKjByOcMBsRwv7B064lZByzdey9ampiryAN8JJfqlYUk40Lqo5GrUShj1gtf-21Iiv79pa9gwKRgC5ULs4NLHDpMt0KA0DfOrRFo78zaZ2AoKkryVDrkNcSDwPZKWGNvr0Ds29kdK4QQM7EmRICP2jfhWSVAX5WjBnxKgZNihllqMXJy-4molzQC-OpD3BQZFFXgRUdH4sr04jFNZIjg9ycVJYd4lYwGMyfhO-G3FcUUo7uXjlwxLNodoVhwCWDAla3w0KmdYgVzAwxZNRg-4Mgzm)

#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f040af068e042d981cf256ae66fb3f5&_e=zw8oUL0X6QDDkkVE51VePVF3gNvk8nCHh-Xx6u5VvYKwhE7VwMHVXPlfYS4KbJFnIc1Vu3uHMg_fJzdChen_C3JeySzJLsb8DYWYD_DmKjByOcMBsRwv7B064lZByzdey9ampiryAN8JJfqlYUk40Lqo5GrUShj1gtf-21Iiv79pa9gwKRgC5ULs4NLHDpMt0KA0DfOrRFo78zaZ2AoKkqSBGc0bGuVH8PL008cdLmR26qLjRx81Qyki6qDCOAhLRcgzCx1eEFLAUO3N35q6mptJcCS1ak3h-upwkgSdNTLXz8lQL08ixqNEtCAJAf1wUb8GVvolHgAnQnO6Wn5JN8zXXFhUa_ZylWejIzKYmkDLZDaboGLB8aRMlpTDkztB)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f040af068e042d981cf256ae66fb3f5&_e=zw8oUL0X6QDDkkVE51VePVF3gNvk8nCHh-Xx6u5VvYKwhE7VwMHVXPlfYS4KbJFnIc1Vu3uHMg_fJzdChen_C3JeySzJLsb8DYWYD_DmKjByOcMBsRwv7B064lZByzdey9ampiryAN8JJfqlYUk40Lqo5GrUShj1gtf-21Iiv79pa9gwKRgC5ULs4NLHDpMt0KA0DfOrRFo78zaZ2AoKklxFO4wy_xj7IcX5zy9anxo5_YEPW_dj_C7jAlc8XLHtdj1vP4Ea4KYRIGWBVXeiDDI6AeC-1qZoLy564JTd727dBpGQBvqfIHdrfHt2FoQrKd-3j_muuJeU999BNA5j2LgtkwI8Pn2_E2WPsti7uJOyUhPuxwc4o63Bc8dwE6ma)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f040af068e042d981cf256ae66fb3f5&_e=zw8oUL0X6QDDkkVE51VePVF3gNvk8nCHh-Xx6u5VvYKwhE7VwMHVXPlfYS4KbJFnIc1Vu3uHMg_fJzdChen_C3JeySzJLsb8DYWYD_DmKjByOcMBsRwv7B064lZByzdey9ampiryAN8JJfqlYUk40Lqo5GrUShj1gtf-21Iiv79pa9gwKRgC5ULs4NLHDpMt0KA0DfOrRFo78zaZ2AoKkvinE0yFYsUY0r9azJGPQwsnsTr-HXXBa0ADd8E23x62hzBxw_oNP8YxoQHglxKJdKLyKHQ0DaSbbe5yYZIbC3SAWRRAKMz6hjW7Wj1bgefmjxwIHnk_8RNC0_OjLA2kcRCX_rMejT47T07_IeWQrwqx6NTckGg-AINvLpt7QoQG)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Mystery, fatigue shroud rising local costs
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6125a30464&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Budget fix or shell game? Delaware County’s $7.6M mystery](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=825fc72660&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Delaware County says it has no documents — not a single email, memo, spreadsheet, text, or voicemail — that could shed light on how $7.6 million dollars magically showed up in the county’s second draft of the 2025 budget, thereby giving the county more breathing room on the massive tax increase it was proposing for the upcoming year.

That $7.6 million infusion into a single spending line is important because it represents most of the difference between the county’s first budget draft proposing a 28 percent tax increase, and the subsequent draft that lowered the proposed tax increase to 23 percent. In other words, the tax decrease between the two versions couldn’t have happened without the additional $7.6 million.

But where that money came from has never been described or explained.

**Why It Matters**. If the county borrowed from Peter to pay Paul, that money would have to be replaced at some point, creating the possibility that the county has more tax hikes in its future unless it finds a way to create $7.6 million in savings or budget cuts.

In late November, days before the county would hold its first open meetings about the budget, _Broad + Liberty_ went to county offices to get copies of the first draft. A line of the budget marked “transfers” only showed $510,000 being counted as revenue for 2025.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b8389d0b2f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Port Richmond elegy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e72e34c7b9&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Thom Nickels_
There’s not a single vacant space in my Riverwards Fishtown-Port Richmond neighborhood that hasn’t been rezoned for rehab by developers.

One night as I was making my way to a friend’s house in the neighborhood, I passed the spot where one of my favorite little houses once stood. This tiny house used to sit next to a large overgrown wooded area. I’ve always called this house, “The Little House That Could.”

It wasn’t a beautiful house by any means, but the way it was situated next to a small patch of urban wildlife near the Belgrade Street overpass has always given it a unique “house in the mountains” look. For years I’d see the owners of this house working outside on their trucks and cars. At Christmastime there was always a simple string of lights placed on the home’s humble door. The truly odd thing about the property was that the overgrown yard wasn’t fenced in. For years anyone could walk in and out of the wooded area which had the look and feel of a little house in the Poconos.

Then, developers invaded the area. They purchased the small wooded area next to the little house and soon built two unsightly, out-of-scale, four-story, cookie-cutter houses with large picture windows and exterior steel prefabricated stairs with inboard rails.

**Why It Matters**. My little street was changing faster than the climate.

In conjunction with all this, the oldest indigenous family on the block moved away, meaning that all the original people that were on the block nineteen years ago when I moved here from Center City were now lost to the ages. Where did the time go?

It’s easy to wax nostalgic, especially since I numbered myself as one of the first “gentrifiers” from Center City. I thought about the old neighborhood that I knew then, especially the look of the broken walls of the old paint factory at Thompson and Huntingdon.

Everywhere I walk in my neighborhood now I see 400K townhouses that look more and more like housing projects in China.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=22d1c7771b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[From The Editors: Delco takes important step of putting campaign finance filings online](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b767293779&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Award for Philly schools superintendent sparks controversy following antisemitism failures](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2a9fa4331b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: Philadelphia benefits when both parties pay attention to it](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=799c2a4ca0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[State senator’s unannounced visit sparks debate over morale and management at Delco’s George W. Hill Prison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=57789be5f1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Dr. Debra Minzola: The last face you see before surgery, the first when you awake](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f50d62f4ef&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **4. Podcast**
---
| Join the staff of _Broad + Liberty_ as they dive into PA's new political landscape, media disruption, and what’s next for PA's future. You won't want to miss this insightful discussion.
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fc4187955f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
The Biden era ended last week with one final burst of corruption. As [Jonathan Turley writes in a piece for _The Hill_ ,](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dd55bf6c48&e=b7b3eddce2) “Joe Biden snatched infamy from the jaws of obscurity” by granting half of his family sweeping, blanket pardons for any offenses they may have committed. “No one is above the law,” Biden said when the Supreme Court ruled that then-ex-President Donald Trump enjoyed some immunity from prosecution. “Unless your name is Biden,” he might have added. But as Broad + Liberty’s own [Kyle Sammin wrote for the _Washington Examiner_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c033701a53&e=b7b3eddce2), Biden’s excessive abuses of the pardoning power might have a silver lining in finally getting Congress to pass a constitutional amendment redistricting it.********
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

---

---

---

You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&e=b7b3eddce2&c=e73a09437a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=e73a09437a).

Pardoning violent insurrectionists. Withdrawing from the Paris climate agreement. Shutting down _legal_ immigration pathways. Trying to end birthright citizenship. If the first week of Donald Trump’s presidency has you feeling alarmed and outraged, you’re not alone. **Here’s something to do about it:** [**Chip in to help us win the next round of battles for our rights and our democracy. Right now, we’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 by the end of the month to turbocharge the fight for fair electoral maps and a government that truly reflects the will of the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100991807/524580808/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JanEOM1_email_20250126-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250126-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM1_&utm_campaign=JanEOM1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MjM1N2Q1LWVkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DLzPtLvlxbI9l9Kp3f5ZzP4dyaMMS9Oa2cjCsD2jgn0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter, we won’t sugarcoat it. The next four years will be long and difficult for anyone who cares about our democracy, the rule of law, our fellow Americans, and people around the world.
**But here’s the thing: You can draw a direct line connecting the dangerous policies of Donald Trump and his enablers to the countless state-level electoral battles happening across the country.**
Just look at the ongoing effort by the GOP to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat. No doubt this is rooted in and fueled by the election-denying lies that Donald Trump continues to repeat — even during his _inauguration_ this past week.
Or look at the upcoming Wisconsin Supreme Court election, which will take place in a state that saw key victories for pro-democracy candidates last November and will now once again determine ideological control of the court.
By electing candidates who respect our elections and protect our freedoms, we can help make sure Americans are able to make their voices heard throughout our government.
Forget “trickle-down” economics — this is “trickle-up” politics, when the work we do defending democracy at the state level can make all the difference at the national level.
**When we fight back against gerrymandering, when we support pro-democracy candidates, when we demand fair representation — we are part of the movement that will ultimately reject MAGA’s dangerous policies and Trump’s authoritarian worldview.**
[**Right now, let’s send a powerful message that we won’t stop working to defend our democracy — chip in a contribution to power our movement in the year ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100991821/524580828/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JanEOM1_email_20250126-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250126-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM1_&utm_campaign=JanEOM1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4MjM1N2Q1LWVkZGItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DLzPtLvlxbI9l9Kp3f5ZzP4dyaMMS9Oa2cjCsD2jgn0=)
Thanks for everything you do,
NDRC HQ

clean_body: Chip in to push back on Trump and fight for fair maps | Pardoning violent insurrectionists. Withdrawing from the Paris climate agreement. Shutting down legal immigration pathways. Trying to end birthright citizenship. If the first week of Donald Trump’s presidency has you feeling alarmed and outraged, you’re not alone. Here’s something to do about it: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Peter, we won’t sugarcoat it. The next four years will be long and difficult for anyone who cares about our democracy, the rule of law, our fellow Americans, and people around the world. But here’s the thing: You can draw a direct line connecting the dangerous policies of Donald Trump and his enablers to the countless state-level electoral battles happening across the country. Just look at the ongoing effort by the GOP to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat. No doubt this is rooted in and fueled by the election-denying lies that Donald Trump continues to repeat — even during his inauguration this past week. Or look at the upcoming Wisconsin Supreme Court election, which will take place in a state that saw key victories for pro-democracy candidates last November and will now once again determine ideological control of the court. By electing candidates who respect our elections and protect our freedoms, we can help make sure Americans are able to make their voices heard throughout our government. Forget “trickle-down” economics — this is “trickle-up” politics, when the work we do defending democracy at the state level can make all the difference at the national level. When we fight back against gerrymandering, when we support pro-democracy candidates, when we demand fair representation — we are part of the movement that will ultimately reject MAGA’s dangerous policies and Trump’s authoritarian worldview. = Thanks for everything you do, NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. body:

| | | Friend, we've had this D.O.G.E interview scheduled for weeks now.

name: Troy Downing
subject: Hail Mary Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I'm down to my last play

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.

Peter, it’s not looking good. **My first end-of-month deadline of 2025 is coming up, and I’m down to my last play.**
---
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.

I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **RADIO SILENCE.**

**THIS. WON’T. DO.**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-A)
---
_I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.

Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.

**I've now taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**

But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to start my first term in Congress strong.

I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY**. **[Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-9l-_4QHayS8mMakTYdlBA)**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-zrsxMi2Yg5Hwg3Kw)
---
[**You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me start the year strong?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Congressman Troy Downing

---
---

---

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:
Read my memo on the recent deportation operations in Boston.
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU1znSAUhn8N7nDwoKILF2mMi8w0049k2q4cBIwkgFRRc--v72jN3b485_A-wK03ur9UiH1BAIOWMwJA9A4B3H2HXz-f1YNi-Okbu2L-oB6f9lO4P9EVbrAT_PJBXrYf74LOH7-tKP84siY3PFy8usHnpbGyXJs9ZXUkKxAFCBGpKmGUlQTyFKKhgixjjGep4B1RPae5FF2Sk64supJ0hEe6AgIZSSBP0pRmacyIKLjqkqJkQjDRo5Rs2sVydNzItzAt1sditJGphhD8fFRqEDSzEsuk4k27ScmdQNAcNHY86H0ai9FaHYJS-K0XCBrj8dDjQwNPis-jm_E2XPCaINoswbZWSb1YROtTNd_DeVwmoRCtjW-Nb4f-zAW3nutXh2j9qdQGJ9pz8__F7dC38qjVGv85OLqgXEC03iWDQpC3zmiJaO2e6df5vriycITHB9N6lX8fX8i1fI-mSvpNG6PnnKGUvO41j9dZK_gXAAD__wSgrNQ)

This is why I need your continued support today...
ICE just carried out deportation raids in a single city - Boston - and here’s what they found:

* A violent, illegal migrant with **17 criminal convictions** shouted, “ _I’m not going back to Haiti! You feel me? F*** Trump! Biden forever, bro!_ ”
* Illegal migrant, from Brazil, **wanted for armed robbery.**
* Illegal migrant from the Dominican Republic, **arrested for assault with a deadly weapon and heroin trafficking.**
* Salvadorian illegal migrant **charged with rape** –released by a sanctuary city.
* Guatemalan MS-13 gang member **taken into custody.**

This is just Boston, folks—one city! These criminals are the face of Biden’s open-border catastrophe.

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Following up on Mandela’s message, re: WI Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
If the GOP’s hand-picked candidate wins this race, the Wisconsin Supreme Court will fall into the hands of a right-wing, extremist majority.
#
Friend, we wanted to quickly follow up on Mandela’s message from a few days back about the Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
We were happy to see the big response we got from this team, with folks chipping in $10, $20, or even just $5 at a time to help elect Judge Susan Crawford.
But we wanted to make sure everyone understands the stakes here, because we need the help of progressives of all kinds to win this important race.
Listen, if the GOP’s hand-picked candidate wins this race, **the Wisconsin Supreme Court will fall into the hands of a right-wing, extremist majority.**
If that happens, they could strike down our new fair maps, reinstate the ban on collective bargaining for workers, hand down new restrictions of abortion access, and completely wind back the clock on the important progress we’ve made in the last few years.
And this is about countering Trump and his MAGA-extremists, too. Because with the GOP’s increasingly anti-democratic, authoritarian rhetoric and policies, a loss here could mean locking Democrats out of electoral victory in Wisconsin for a long time.
So with this election just a few months away, we are running out of time to build our momentum and get our message out there. That’s why we are asking for your support once again.
[**Will you split a contribution between Susan Crawford and The Long Run today? Join the folks who are already pitching in to make sure we defend this crucial seat. We have less than three months to win this thing.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250126-1-180&t=1&akid=5464%2E196590%2ECwqOFh)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

Any donation, no matter the size, helps us get more volunteers and resources into Wisconsin.
Thank you,
The Long Run PAC

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Any donation, no matter the size, helps us get more volunteers and resources into Wisconsin. Thank you, The Long Run PAC

name: The Democratic Party
subject: It’s January 26, 2025
body:
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to donate directly to the DNC ahead of our first FEC deadline of the year to help us build a strong Democratic Party that will fight back against Trump and his extreme billionaire allies. If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to pitch in: [**https://democrats.org/go/January-FEC**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250126_2645_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2645_22930333_DkWvNc&akid=2645%2E22930333%2EDkWvNc) Otherwise, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why your support is so important right now: We are one week into the Trump presidency and we’ve already seen its terrible impact. The attempted end of birthright citizenship, the pardoning of January 6 rioters, the rolling back of President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid, and so much more. And this is just the beginning. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we build the long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. But to do that, we need your help. When we close our books on January, our fundraising numbers will once again be public for everyone to see. We need to meet our goal so we can be prepared for whatever happens next. Maybe you weren’t considering making a contribution to the DNC today, but we hope this message has shown you how urgent and meaningful your support is right now. So here comes the part where we ask: [**Can you pitch in $3 ahead of our FEC deadline to help us reach our goals, hold Trump accountable, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250126_2645_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2645_22930333_DkWvNc&akid=2645%2E22930333%2EDkWvNc) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250126_2645_fr&refcode2=2645_22930333_DkWvNc&akid=2645%2E22930333%2EDkWvNc)**

name: AOC
subject: You're being ripped off.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
What makes this go around so much more dangerous, is that **Trump is much more normalized than he was the first time**.
The first time, people were really on edge, really on guard, they were really vigilant about any breaks he would have with the norm.
This time, **the norms are embracing him**.
Even little things that everyday, working people may not care about but are strong cultural signals — like Oscar de la Renta dressing all of the women at the inauguration.
All these people who were scared before about being associated with him, from the most common, basic level to the most elite level: they’re all in because **this is now a billionaire feeding frenzy**.
It is a kiss-ass race. It is “How can I show how much fealty I have to Donald Trump in order to get my digs?”
What's really important for people to understand, now and every day of this administration, is that you’re being ripped off.
**Everyone is being ripped off**. He goes up there and he says what he wants to say.
He’s just the quintessential New York con man.
We're not witnessing the _start_ of an oligarchy — **we are fully here**.
Our movement for real progress for everyday people will have to push harder than ever these next four years.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250126.KWXYWs&refcode=em20250126-7988-P_FND_VID_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250126.KWXYWs&refcode=em20250126-7988-P_FND_VID_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250126?refcode=em20250126-7988-P_FND_VID_GRM&t=21&refcode2=7988_2526796_oV1wQD&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250126-7988-P_FND_VID_GRM&t=22&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7988%2E2526796%2EoV1wQD)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Gay Valimont
subject: HES IN DANGER BECAUSE OF TRUMP!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress

---
_**“They are playing with his [Bolton’s] life, not merely damaging his professional opportunities, but they’re putting a man’s life at risk in order to punish him for criticizing Donald Trump...”**_ Greetings from Gay Valimont, candidate for Florida’s 1st District, here to show you the above quote and tell you that Trump’s former National Security Advisor is under fire. The removal of his Secret Service Privileges just days after an assassination plot was confirmed by the U.S. Intelligence community goes to show how much of a power trip Trump is on. **If he doesn’t care about those he has worked alongside, he won’t hesitate to pull the rug from under the American people. I need your help to stop this before April 1st special elections are in full-swing.**
---
---
This is what Trump had to say in response: _“I spent millions of dollars in legal fees and I won, but I did it the hard way. It’s really hard to say that they shouldn’t have to go through it also. It is very hard to say that.” _ His indifference towards Bolton’s life being in jeopardy is _inhuman_ , and a testament to his determination to do _nothing but make headlines for his own gain_.

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: The Perfect Recipe for Disaster
body:
Who ordered fiscal instability & higher taxes?
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018LRYYhKlfc9VlyYVKmgCVsBqgPBDdMXaM_DkAPGivLDpdn44yUBtxf-WOk4D6oEpY8ijC4k9cIfhwDnBxQ_y-Asue4lToCREQLjU70euhipvzFARjaKdjP-Oc6z7KSoTb8RS5vieS3YpCj4BOgRw0Q==&c=cJ2bfOoHIHymByvF2LsAqsSA713xAkUDh7a0ZINW7xfTHRys3E7u2g==&ch=pY21WymhizMHG0WuUgypcWAI2e97m5wh-ypgh-T4chwAUDZ2_QnS0g==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Governor Maura Healey's annual budget proposal is out - and it's the perfect recipe for fiscal instability and higher taxes.
$62,000,000,000 Gov. Healey's proposed FY2026 budget, representing a 7.4% increase from the 2025 budget.
Harmful tax proposals The new tax on candy & capping charitable donation deductions punishes Massachusetts residents while enabling unchecked spending on Beacon Hill.
Back-door tax increases Allowing local governments to raise taxes is a political maneuver that avoids accountability while forcing families to be on the hook.
Fiscal recklessness & missed opportunities Governor Healey's proposals are disconnected from the realities faced by Massachusetts families and businesses.
The MassGOP is calling on the Healey-Driscoll Administration to prioritize sustainable, transparent, and responsible budgeting that respects taxpayers and supports long-term stability.
Our State Leaders should be focused on reform, efficiency, and fiscal discipline -- not one-time fixes and political posturing.
[AGREE?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018LRYYhKlfc9VlyYVKmgCVsBqgPBDdMXaM_DkAPGivLDpdn44yUBtxUqWqd_h6ibaxPHly_igN-2D6o6Pdy2FXgOZZZTX9zNol-5a28AA-X-N2ipmUlNC4Ugz5agrX0oDSWqgc0dbHkbLOWyvMOFtvxZZteg2pmApE9C6br3HyNa8rhOhpeEW6sICSxqnB2x5&c=cJ2bfOoHIHymByvF2LsAqsSA713xAkUDh7a0ZINW7xfTHRys3E7u2g==&ch=pY21WymhizMHG0WuUgypcWAI2e97m5wh-ypgh-T4chwAUDZ2_QnS0g==)
---
| | [FUND COMMON SENSE REPUBLICANS RUNNING ACROSS MA](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018LRYYhKlfc9VlyYVKmgCVsBqgPBDdMXaM_DkAPGivLDpdn44yUBtxUqWqd_h6ibaxPHly_igN-2D6o6Pdy2FXgOZZZTX9zNol-5a28AA-X-N2ipmUlNC4Ugz5agrX0oDSWqgc0dbHkbLOWyvMOFtvxZZteg2pmApE9C6br3HyNa8rhOhpeEW6sICSxqnB2x5&c=cJ2bfOoHIHymByvF2LsAqsSA713xAkUDh7a0ZINW7xfTHRys3E7u2g==&ch=pY21WymhizMHG0WuUgypcWAI2e97m5wh-ypgh-T4chwAUDZ2_QnS0g==)
---
Thank you,
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

P.S. - We're laser focused on peeling back the Democrats' supermajority one race, one candidate, and one VICTORY at a time.
Chip in to help us recruit Republican candidates across the state (no amount is too small) -> [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/2026](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018LRYYhKlfc9VlyYVKmgCVsBqgPBDdMXaM_DkAPGivLDpdn44yUBtxUqWqd_h6ibaxPHly_igN-2D6o6Pdy2FXgOZZZTX9zNol-5a28AA-X-N2ipmUlNC4Ugz5agrX0oDSWqgc0dbHkbLOWyvMOFtvxZZteg2pmApE9C6br3HyNa8rhOhpeEW6sICSxqnB2x5&c=cJ2bfOoHIHymByvF2LsAqsSA713xAkUDh7a0ZINW7xfTHRys3E7u2g==&ch=pY21WymhizMHG0WuUgypcWAI2e97m5wh-ypgh-T4chwAUDZ2_QnS0g==)

I always knew the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And like I’ve always said, it’s a fight I’d wage over and over again.
---
But even now, after President Trump resoundingly won back the White House and DEFEATED the Democrat Swap, __there are still Deep State holdouts hellbent on**JAILING** me for the rest of my life. __
---
**I face an outstanding _INDICTMENT_ in Arizona at the hands of the Left’s cronies and accomplices that is scheduled to go to trial. **
---
But I’ll tell you what: While this case means the Left is _still_ seeking to utterly ruin me, it also means I’m just _one final step_ away from VINDICATION!
---
**Just look at the second MUGSHOT they took of me when I was booked in Maricopa County, Arizona.__Do I look scared of the Deep State to you?__**

__
---

My resolve to fight this injustice – not _just_ for my freedom, but for the freedom of ALL Americans – will **_NEVER_** waver.
---
And despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong without an ounce of fear – _thanks to unbelievably kind and generous souls like _YOU_ who have given me the resources and support I need to remain a FREE man._

_If you can afford to contribute, please know any contribution you can make to my Legal Defense Trust will be greatly appreciated to fight this sham INDICTMENT – the Deep State’s FINAL witch hunt against me._

---
Dear Patriot,
Are you ready to make a bold statement and celebrate a monumental moment in American history? We've got just the thing to help you do exactly that!
Introducing the [**American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20020/6374453/4ecf24228f29b075a844e81c47a244d5fabfce5c/60a8436ef012d3af0383aa3a6fdc1e3f841bd893), a stunning tribute to President Trump's extraordinary return to the White House. This isn't just any hat—it's a symbol of pride and victory, commemorating Trump as the 45th and 47th President of the United States.
**Features of the American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat:**
* **Elegant Embroidery:** The numbers 45 & 47 are beautifully stitched, marking the historic presidency and re-election of a true American leader.
* **Stylish and Patriotic Design:** The sleek leatherette patch pairs perfectly with the American flag, making it not just a hat, but a piece of history.
* **Proudly Made in the USA:** Wear it with pride, knowing it's crafted on American soil, supporting American jobs.

This hat is more than just headwear—it's a keepsake for anyone who cherishes freedom and leadership. It's perfect for wearing at rallies, displaying in your home, or giving as a gift to fellow supporters.
Don't miss out on owning a piece of this historic inauguration. Stock is limited, and they’re flying off the shelves!
**P.S.** Act fast—these exclusive hats are a hit and won’t last long. Secure yours today and be part of the celebration!
---

name: Gingrich, Newt
subject: EMPTY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second.

| |
---
| | | This is the most serious call I've made in a while - and it's to you, Peter.

Hey, this is Newt Gingrich. I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms:

_Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second._

_Yes, we took back the Senate ... Yes, we saved the House... And yes, we re-elected President Trump..._

But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. As a direct result of these strategic investments, our budgets are now running on FUMES!

**And to make matters worse, Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP.**

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to launch a major rebuilding effort for House Republicans to refill our warchest with ONE MILLION DOLLARS. _**[Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before the end of the month?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3142eceb94164d07a45d0c668495d1ae&_e=yOycz8CvBtB8zlpKUr2TEShBgv3XKXyNsRoskvZMtYYLeWUAQo3qc-9x6RlNwIa-1gqvXc3mwrfFZHY5F5H87tPnzpdrJ9Mik63HG7EciK2V39iBBYzVhsvpL05x8UYAOqIzaDghARBWD8BkRMh9vpI84uWrxBLdintx_1OJ_vOL3hqdwM16Vxq235X3wztpRL2htVGqpfM3mTnZluqDwKou9LSevw5FN7GHVmEWKtBbzLQGRCRwk27ZSin3Q-eN3wmxuefNvb2KQctjykh-IHnA3QkpiyKKdIUmpT8X4UrXEkZCHtXCEVlFTYYO5vd1K_h_BVApIQVQNK1I525IjAru27FgQ9oXY1BuVDnrbt_yZXAihXjPNMOb0w5PCcHu-R5HxS0AnEGqLW_pm_urNRB8_yiEzhRJVNR9lAL4Po4%3D "Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before Inauguration Day?")**_

clean_body: I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second. | | | | | This is the most serious call I've made in a while - and it's to you, Peter. Hey, this is Newt Gingrich. I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second. Yes, we took back the Senate ... Yes, we saved the House... And yes, we re-elected President Trump... But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. As a direct result of these strategic investments, our budgets are now running on FUMES! And to make matters worse, Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP. That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to launch a major rebuilding effort for House Republicans to refill our warchest with ONE MILLION DOLLARS. "Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before Inauguration Day?" CALL TO ACTION!!!

Dear Moms,

We’re launching a signature campaign to show our unified support for Trump’s nominee, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as the next Secretary
of Health and Human Services. Your signature can help amplify our voices in demanding a healthier, safer, and more transparent
future for American families.

How YOU Can Help...

Sign the petition by adding your name today!

Every signature counts! Together, let’s show our leaders that families demand change and accountability.

clean_body: Sign the petition by adding your name today to show unified support in confirming Robert F. Kennedy, Jr, for Secretary of Health and Human Services If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] CALL TO ACTION!!! Dear Moms, We’re launching a signature campaign to show our unified support for Trump’s nominee, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as the next Secretary of Health and Human Services. Your signature can help amplify our voices in demanding a healthier, safer, and more transparent future for American families. How YOU Can Help... Sign the petition by adding your name today! Every signature counts! Together, let’s show our leaders that families demand change and accountability. TAKE ACTION NOW!!! SIGN THE PETITION TODAY! [] Thank you for taking a stand for faith, family, and freedom. Thank you for your continued commitment to our mission. [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America Action® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: The ethnic cleansing of Palestinians has not stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
International law is clear, and our movement must also be clear that we won’t stop until Palestine is free. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWOcMVP_rMd705xhWvqeRN2Wr-IwMtH3Nk8QxeL6p2z4abVWd9AyV5ltlFzp21emALhi4_R5GZuv9OLHwaoYh95p93cQZSRYLvcqnnlvFXREk2SZbh7ZZ6GDRaAlRtAyaJOoXwpYqa2W3XRircznoOt0Svst4vKPfQhc6PNDKsOK0DGwved66BRMibfI9ysid4_cAwtRM1xd5gbPKMV3GDFd1YeXypUxGsIE0q9g961hw/4dh/ODyp650rQZmnOCqlsccRlA/h0/h001.Og7Ylvxv842xOcu_zyGojhL5mNA8naA7Ji1Li6THhWI)
---
Friend, The world is watching to see if Israel’s government actually implements the temporary ceasefire deal in Gaza that began last weekend. Negotiators have agreed to the first phase of the deal: a temporary six-week ceasefire that would provide Palestinians with much-needed relief. But even this first phase is fragile, with Israel’s military killing Palestinians in Gaza and the West Bank this week after the deal’s start date. **We cannot stop pushing—not only for a permanent ceasefire, but for arms embargoes and more to ensure Palestinians’ equal rights and freedom.** Even a permanent ceasefire is just the first step. Israel’s government must allow unrestricted humanitarian aid into Gaza and end its control over Gaza’s borders and the West Bank. We cannot go back to the oppressive status quo that existed before October 2023, including Israel’s cruel blockade on Gaza. **Israel must also abide by last summer’s ruling from the world’s top court, which demanded Israel ensure the right of return and reparations for Palestinians and immediately withdraw from the occupied Palestinian territories** —including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem. In its ruling last July, the International Court of Justice also affirmed that Israel is committing the crime of apartheid and violating Palestinians’ right to self-determination. **The court made clear that under international law, countries are obligated to end assistance for Israel’s illegal apartheid and occupation—including through arms embargoes and sanctions against Israel.** [**Will you sign the petition to demand not only a**** _permanent_****ceasefire, but true Palestinian self-determination and liberation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5NS1wNc1cxE-O5Q-WX7S4KQFCeKtGkLSDwAgpV6xgKYJHLZvOgB306VW9kAi_EzuftrfNUfRjpTW5eTmwiKu1iaXGKriUuluYXDRwM4WS7XxlYnFJ88qBK1YwNS-SOP_84UDXz3KNH3mFZkHaYgRi5GaPUANM_t4Jkc67ry4juaaLUkfaitHQvLh-fJU4ZpEFjl_XDDq9rH9JkJztN5puY1Ji9IpnWnm3ZTKIm0m7DoykAraWVfj0yLjwvz-dDwrdLB4LVneYpP1PVdYjI8TNHe0NtNZmpm9PZ74wiciWNhd1o_QC6yTxh10PotIjQ7jZE4ivA36Ne6mvEevoO4cuxlG0CMtdEaK8G-FrrPugEaOWltnHGnRR4uaCe5a2xNDlB9cZqBi_hoh0E94R5AxT1s3vbYHRII94pl8idBP5puRUcbYjp657hwH4m4pCoiLC64jh21orysXUslniPheYIQ/4dh/ODyp650rQZmnOCqlsccRlA/h1/h001.Vp-kU-3dWJz4j9t7XFKrToQdwleEiOv-UesVmi1qyMU) Since the International Court of Justice’s ruling last July, Israel’s genocidal war crimes have continued to escalate, and countries like the U.S. have continued to shield Israel from accountability—even after the International Criminal Court issued arrest warrants against Israel’s Prime Minister and Defense Minister for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Last fall, the vast majority of countries in the United Nations voted for a Palestine-led resolution to affirm the International Court of Justice’s ruling, but the United States blocked the measure. As one of the few countries in the United Nations with veto power, the U.S. has continually vetoed measures for a ceasefire and for Palestinian sovereignty. The U.S. is also by far the biggest funder and arms supplier for Israel’s military. It’s because of unconditional U.S. support that Israel’s leaders have been able to violate human rights and international law with impunity for decades. That’s why **U.S. residents must keep pushing the U.S. government to enact an arms embargo and take other actions to stop its illegal support for Israel’s atrocities.** The genocide and the killings of Palestinians won’t stop until the U.S. cuts off the flow of weapons. We must make sure to keep listening to Palestinians on the ground and supporting what they want for their own self-governance, including uplifting their demands for next steps. For now, our movement must demonstrate that we know a temporary ceasefire is just the beginning. We cannot back down until Palestine is free. Palestinians and Israelis celebrated in the streets after mediators announced a temporary ceasefire deal. But in between the announcement and the beginning of the truce last weekend, Israel’s government killed hundreds of Palestinians in Gaza. After the start date for the truce, the Israeli military not only killed a young child in Gaza but also killed over a dozen Palestinians in the West Bank.
**The ethnic cleansing of Palestinians has not stopped** , and it won’t stop unless the U.S. stops arming and funding Israel’s apartheid regime. Israel’s genocidal Prime Minister Netanyahu has already expressed skepticism about extending the Gaza ceasefire past this first six-week phase, and it remains to be seen whether even this first phase will be implemented as it should.

Even if Palestinians in Gaza are allowed to rebuild without being bombed, they cannot go back to the intolerable conditions that were in place before October 2023, including the years of Israel’s inhumane blockade of Gaza’s borders.
At minimum, Israel’s government must abide by last year’s rulings from the world’s top court, which affirmed that Israel is carrying out apartheid and demanded that Israel fulfill its obligations under international law to ensure Palestinians’ right to return and right to self-determination. **The International Court of Justice ruled that Israel’s government must pay reparations to Palestinians and end its illegal occupation of Palestinian territories including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem.** Most countries in the United Nations voted in agreement with these demands, and urged countries to enact arms embargoes and sanctions on Israel in the meantime.

In the past 15 months, Israel’s military has forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians, about 95% of Gaza’s population, often multiple times. Israel’s military has killed at least 46,900 Palestinans in Gaza, including at least 18,000 children—and injured at least 100,700 people.1 These are undercounts: According to a peer-reviewed study published this month in the Lancet, at least 70,000 Palestinians in Gaza were killed between October 7 2023 and June 30 2024.2 Since June, Israel’s military has continued to relentlessly bomb Gaza and commit clear war crimes by targeting children, medical providers and aid workers, and journalists.
**This has been a horrific genocidal escalation after 76 years of continued ethnic cleansing** , starting with the Nakba, when the state of Israel was created through the forced removal and murder of hundreds of thousands of Palestinians.
Now, nearly all of Gaza’s 2.3 million residents are experiencing “acute food insecurity” at crisis levels.1 Some humanitarian aid is getting through with this temporary Gaza ceasefire, but human rights groups like the World Food Program have said that they can only provide needed aid if Israel continues to allow unhindered access through all border crossings and ensures that aid workers can move freely and safely within Gaza.
**As an occupying power, Israel’s government still maintains tight control over Palestinians’ daily lives, including in the West Bank.** Even as Israel’s government has begun to release some imprisoned Palestinians as laid out in the ceasefire and hostage exchange deal, thousands still remain under “administrative detention”—indefinitely held without charge or trial while brutally tortured. For the detainees who do get charged, Israel’s illegal apartheid system sends Palestinian civilians (including children) through Israel’s unjust military courts, which have a 99% conviction rate of Palestinians.
**We cannot turn away or give up the fight for Palestinians’ liberation and human dignity, including the right to live on their own terms with true self-government.**
Until Palestine is free, **we must keep demanding countries like the United States stop supporting Israel’s illegal presence in occupied Palestine** —as required by international law and demanded last year by the International Court of Justice and the majority of United Nations member states, which have also called for sanctions and arms embargoes to pressure Israel to comply with international law.

Now Republican members of Congress keep threatening to condition aid for the Los Angeles wildfires, despite blocking any conditions on U.S. funding for Israeli war crimes.

clean_body: International law is clear, and our movement must also be clear that we won’t stop until Palestine is free. | | | Friend, The world is watching to see if Israel’s government actually implements the temporary ceasefire deal in Gaza that began last weekend. Negotiators have agreed to the first phase of the deal: a temporary six-week ceasefire that would provide Palestinians with much-needed relief. But even this first phase is fragile, with Israel’s military killing Palestinians in Gaza and the West Bank this week after the deal’s start date. We cannot stop pushing—not only for a permanent ceasefire, but for arms embargoes and more to ensure Palestinians’ equal rights and freedom. Even a permanent ceasefire is just the first step. Israel’s government must allow unrestricted humanitarian aid into Gaza and end its control over Gaza’s borders and the West Bank. We cannot go back to the oppressive status quo that existed before October 2023, including Israel’s cruel blockade on Gaza. Israel must also abide by last summer’s ruling from the world’s top court, which demanded Israel ensure the right of return and reparations for Palestinians and immediately withdraw from the occupied Palestinian territories —including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem. In its ruling last July, the International Court of Justice also affirmed that Israel is committing the crime of apartheid and violating Palestinians’ right to self-determination. The court made clear that under international law, countries are obligated to end assistance for Israel’s illegal apartheid and occupation—including through arms embargoes and sanctions against Israel. Since the International Court of Justice’s ruling last July, Israel’s genocidal war crimes have continued to escalate, and countries like the U.S. have continued to shield Israel from accountability—even after the International Criminal Court issued arrest warrants against Israel’s Prime Minister and Defense Minister for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Last fall, the vast majority of countries in the United Nations voted for a Palestine-led resolution to affirm the International Court of Justice’s ruling, but the United States blocked the measure. As one of the few countries in the United Nations with veto power, the U.S. has continually vetoed measures for a ceasefire and for Palestinian sovereignty. The U.S. is also by far the biggest funder and arms supplier for Israel’s military. It’s because of unconditional U.S. support that Israel’s leaders have been able to violate human rights and international law with impunity for decades. That’s why U.S. residents must keep pushing the U.S. government to enact an arms embargo and take other actions to stop its illegal support for Israel’s atrocities. The genocide and the killings of Palestinians won’t stop until the U.S. cuts off the flow of weapons. We must make sure to keep listening to Palestinians on the ground and supporting what they want for their own self-governance, including uplifting their demands for next steps. For now, our movement must demonstrate that we know a temporary ceasefire is just the beginning. We cannot back down until Palestine is free. | Thank you. Together, we will keep demanding equal rights and human dignity for the Palestinian people. We will keep standing up for the sanctity of all life. Israel’s genocidal Prime Minister Netanyahu has already expressed skepticism about extending the Gaza ceasefire past this first six-week phase, and it remains to be seen whether even this first phase will be implemented as it should. Even if a permanent ceasefire were secured in both Gaza and the West Bank, that would still not be enough. Over the past 15 months, the Israeli government has destroyed most of Gaza’s healthcare system, agricultural lands, access to clean water, infrastructure, and other necessary conditions to sustain life. Even if Palestinians in Gaza are allowed to rebuild without being bombed, they cannot go back to the intolerable conditions that were in place before October 2023, including the years of Israel’s inhumane blockade of Gaza’s borders. At minimum, Israel’s government must abide by last year’s rulings from the world’s top court, which affirmed that Israel is carrying out apartheid and demanded that Israel fulfill its obligations under international law to ensure Palestinians’ right to return and right to self-determination. The International Court of Justice ruled that Israel’s government must pay reparations to Palestinians and end its illegal occupation of Palestinian territories including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem. Most countries in the United Nations voted in agreement with these demands, and urged countries to enact arms embargoes and sanctions on Israel in the meantime. International law is clear, and our movement must also be clear: We won’t stop until Palestine is free. In the past 15 months, Israel’s military has forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians, about 95% of Gaza’s population, often multiple times. Israel’s military has killed at least 46,900 Palestinans in Gaza, including at least 18,000 children—and injured at least 100,700 people.1 These are undercounts: According to a peer-reviewed study published this month in the Lancet, at least 70,000 Palestinians in Gaza were killed between October 7 2023 and June 30 2024.2 Since June, Israel’s military has continued to relentlessly bomb Gaza and commit clear war crimes by targeting children, medical providers and aid workers, and journalists. This has been a horrific genocidal escalation after 76 years of continued ethnic cleansing , starting with the Nakba, when the state of Israel was created through the forced removal and murder of hundreds of thousands of Palestinians. Now, nearly all of Gaza’s 2.3 million residents are experiencing “acute food insecurity” at crisis levels.1 Some humanitarian aid is getting through with this temporary Gaza ceasefire, but human rights groups like the World Food Program have said that they can only provide needed aid if Israel continues to allow unhindered access through all border crossings and ensures that aid workers can move freely and safely within Gaza. As an occupying power, Israel’s government still maintains tight control over Palestinians’ daily lives, including in the West Bank. Even as Israel’s government has begun to release some imprisoned Palestinians as laid out in the ceasefire and hostage exchange deal, thousands still remain under “administrative detention”—indefinitely held without charge or trial while brutally tortured. For the detainees who do get charged, Israel’s illegal apartheid system sends Palestinian civilians (including children) through Israel’s unjust military courts, which have a 99% conviction rate of Palestinians. We cannot turn away or give up the fight for Palestinians’ liberation and human dignity, including the right to live on their own terms with true self-government. Until Palestine is free, we must keep demanding countries like the United States stop supporting Israel’s illegal presence in occupied Palestine —as required by international law and demanded last year by the International Court of Justice and the majority of United Nations member states, which have also called for sanctions and arms embargoes to pressure Israel to comply with international law. We must also keep pushing the U.S. to stop shielding Israel from accountability , especially as one of the few countries that can actually veto UN measures—and has been the sole veto for multiple ceasefire resolutions and steps for Palestinian sovereignty. Instead of sanctioning Israel, most of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives voted for sanctions against the International Criminal Court after its long-overdue decision to issue arrest warrants to Israel’s Prime Minister and Defense Minister for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Now Republican members of Congress keep threatening to condition aid for the Los Angeles wildfires, despite blocking any conditions on U.S. funding for Israeli war crimes. Our movement for Palestinian liberation cannot back down now. Thank you for continuing to take action to support equal human rights for Palestinians. When we recognize our shared humanity and truly value all life, we create a safer world for all of us. In love and solidarity, Rashida 1 and 2 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

subject: Add your endorsement?

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=61%2E181023%2EbYwbys)
Team,
Did you see this message last week? We wanted to give you another opportunity to officially endorse Jocelyn Benson’s campaign for Governor personally.
We’re building a team big enough to win this competitive battleground state — and it will take all of us coming together to make sure Jocelyn wins and ensures government can work for everybody.
**[Now’s your chance: Will you officially endorse Jocelyn Benson for Governor of Michigan today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/endorse-jocelyn-benson-governor?source=em20250126-1&akid=61%2E181023%2EbYwbys)**

Thank you.
-- Benson HQ

\--------Forwarded message--------
From: Team Benson
Date: Thu, Jan 23, 2025 at 4:00 PM
Subject: Will you endorse Jocelyn Benson for Governor?
Team,
Yesterday, Jocelyn announced her campaign for Michigan Governor. Today, we’re asking you to endorse her campaign personally. **[Will you add your endorsement?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/endorse-jocelyn-benson-governor?source=em20250126-1&akid=61%2E181023%2EbYwbys)**
**[Endorse Jocelyn ››](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/endorse-jocelyn-benson-governor?source=em20250126-1&akid=61%2E181023%2EbYwbys)**
The energy since Jocelyn announced her campaign launch has been exhilarating. Folks from all across the state are excited to jump on board and support Jocelyn’s campaign.
Jocelyn is running for Governor because we need leaders in government who are dedicated to ensuring government works for everyone — not just a select few. Michigan deserves a leader who will improve how our government works, push for efficacy and transparency, and protect our democracy.
Never forget that, in a democracy, power remains in the people’s hands.
We have the power to make sure that our kids are safe, that women will have control over their own bodies, and that we all will have clean air to breathe and clean water to drink.
Jocelyn is the best choice for Michigan’s future. **[If you’re on board, will you add your name to personally endorse her campaign for Governor? Add your endorsement now.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/endorse-jocelyn-benson-governor?source=em20250126-1&akid=61%2E181023%2EbYwbys)**

Team Benson
