name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Trump wants to abandon our Afghan allies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets worked around the clock during the withdrawal from Afghanistan to secure and facilitate evacuations for Afghans we served alongside, as well as their families. We continue that work to this day. And now, we’re asking you to stand with us.
#
Over the course of the twenty year war in Afghanistan, countless Afghan allies fought and died by our sides.
Thousands of those allies are now trapped and in imminent danger because Donald Trump has abandoned our commitment to bring them to safety in the United States.
It’s a travesty. A betrayal. A mark of shame on our country.
But if it continues — if Trump and his administration do not step up and honor our commitment — it will put Americans in danger in future conflicts. Who would stand and fight alongside us if they knew we’d abandon them when the going got tough? Why would anyone put themselves in harm's way for us if they thought we’d leave them high and dry?
VoteVets worked around the clock during the withdrawal from Afghanistan to secure and facilitate evacuations for Afghans we served alongside, as well as their families. We continue that work to this day. And now, we’re asking you to stand with us.
This isn’t an email asking for a donation — we’re asking you to speak out.
[**Sign this petition and demand that the Trump administration honor our commitment to secure the evacuation of our Afghan allies. And after you do, speak out about this to everyone you know. Spread the word. It’s going to take a lot of noise to get this done, and we can’t do it without you.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250124_vv_em_afganistan?refcode=&akid=34114%2E3013755%2EN9STUI)
| [ADD Your Name](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250124_vv_em_afganistan?refcode=&akid=34114%2E3013755%2EN9STUI)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

I am proud to share some humbling news with each of you today.
**Just 9 months and 1 day since we launched in April of 2024,**_**Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**has officially surpassed 100,000 followers! All thanks to you.**
As a reminder, I launched _Let 's Address This_ to ensure my readers had timely, critical, and accurate information on the human rights issues that impact us all. And now:
* As legacy media continues to capitulate to billionaires
* As the new White House continues to enact fascist policies
* As economic, social, and climate injustices continue to increase

You have made Let's Address This that newsletter that more than 100,000 people rely on for timely, critical, and accurate information on human rights. I am truly honored.
**Here 's a snapshot of why you subscribed:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1500a2a8-de45-44ad-ab73-ff3b912b28ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Where Do We Go Next?
We continue to build--with you leading the way. I ask you to choose at least 1 of my 3 calls to action and elevate _Let 's Address This_ to the next level (especially as the fascist President continues his injustices).
1. **Jump in.** Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year. We are not funded by billionaires. We are supported by We the People.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xjmf2bWIbBGkKMsopLEReVqpJ-Ggc8vH-69XaKBBXhM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155757794)
2. **Grow our community.** Gift a subscription to a friend or loved one. The best way to build our movement is _each one reach one_. Let's grow from 100K to 200K.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..xjmf2bWIbBGkKMsopLEReVqpJ-Ggc8vH-69XaKBBXhM?&gift=true)
3. **Maximize our reach.** Share this post on your social media, in your family group chat, or simply like and comment. Engage and help boost its visibility.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155757794&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NzU3Nzk0LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc5MDc0NjksImV4cCI6MTc0MDQ5OTQ2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.775OfiZ-LwjzK7bhAzTeB7AdFih_qdMcnhprExQVvwM)

## **A Final Word**
Donald Trump has already signed more than 200 Executive Orders. These include ICE raids of schools, mass deportations, a Muslim ban 2.0, anti-LGBTQ orders, and has now even attempted to fire 17 Inspectors Generals (who are responsible specifically to independently audit the government). Meanwhile, corporate media continues to capitulate to him. And just as mortifying, the billionaires lined up behind him at the inauguration remind us that they will do everything possible to get their precious billionaire tax cuts--including repeal DEI initiatives, roll back life saving regulations, and continue to pollute our environment during climate catastrophe.
My mission remains clear--**uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do** , and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. **This is why I seek your support.** Your support of Let's Address This is an investment to demand justice and universal human rights.
Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union.
**Thank you for your trust. ❤️**
Sincerely,
Qasim
**Subscribe and join our movement of now more than 100,000 activists.**

body:
Before they’re gone

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c816a1bfe08421892d21780a678a4fe&_e=ApnZBy5C3rqI28H9DGg6jszfia9S852QRv9LlI2WVKA9-b6v5ydZz_Hl54KgYYToFg9bLMPwfgi-GrQG56c-Ndjzh8y1LaqE4N8rTOWlrOtMnEAQlx5r9eA3st9p8jx7Vu1yzrIpg2gO9dFm0_XjK5ngE-1ZHe-esLtH-vzg7fsdGovDJt5shyIiS6Ac2hC6j1M8fPJ5hpEvhvjx8spMGlt07VAZq7fjQ5vXq_BV-gihcewXFwcnDBLiSAWplNu7i3bE4kDwiwTWQH65Jtg8aYhw8q6nuSZf50Wh4RxPRCgeKdGZgaUZMLg9W3JcFFSCzTr4618vjHU79BtowvVunPLpQa5SRQKuKu6PrbI_AgeaPACHmXzCXAFusUg_1_6No_bn3osJ61LPWNc6VyKJHeRcmjaxWzMUUysnpMROnw4%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c816a1bfe08421892d21780a678a4fe&_e=ApnZBy5C3rqI28H9DGg6jszfia9S852QRv9LlI2WVKA9-b6v5ydZz_Hl54KgYYToFg9bLMPwfgi-GrQG56c-Ndjzh8y1LaqE4N8rTOWlrOtMnEAQlx5r9eA3st9p8jx7Vu1yzrIpg2gO9dFm0_XjK5ngE-1ZHe-esLtH-vzg7fsdGovDJt5shyIiS6Ac2hC6j1M8fPJ5hpEvhvjx8spMGlt07VAZq7fjQ5vXq_BV-gihcewXFwcnDBLiSAWplNu7i3bE4kDwiwTWQH65Jtg8aROb7DoyaI2fT6eUL02-BTWrGLnYItq-I6kGzBMj0KBtHwfPVE3zk6u1udvCThiy-bLSeKwSZ9Udzf-XNCK-Qpcrnf6T1nSduxHey73Wo2ED0eVXb3yJK_uVv8_CC_LScckWdREB9eo3z5gg6y2x-EE%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c816a1bfe08421892d21780a678a4fe&_e=ApnZBy5C3rqI28H9DGg6jszfia9S852QRv9LlI2WVKA9-b6v5ydZz_Hl54KgYYToFg9bLMPwfgi-GrQG56c-Ndjzh8y1LaqE4N8rTOWlrOtMnEAQlx5r9eA3st9p8jx7Vu1yzrIpg2gO9dFm0_XjK5ngE-1ZHe-esLtH-vzg7fsdGovDJt5shyIiS6Ac2hC6j1M8fPJ5hpEvhvjx8spMGlt07VAZq7fjQ5vXq_BV-gihcewXFwcnDBLiSAWplNu7i3bE4kDwiwTWQH65Jtg8aW3p6_GdtMfAIduPz1Pxq6UtHhiJWCtjBLQH_3ao5c0yP_6TuIGRDQl6tIJuF7riyjvi38os0I6VCeYY7xvCGxLwRNrutL8C849I2HTtCw6R7-BOfle2sWfZOQotcnpWBynNnFc25IobaepZWX2p7I8%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
Who rules whom?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | |
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=44015598a10d421284952c9910c6cb89&_e=Y5ZYw5Li8P_c1Ox8mkLIKNMZSzLVtc8FoFX5TyuFycqLinzGDaIvfFDkhQqr_on-yTZMdSr1aK8hgQ1arw_lv5F4wIwjHB9unDPwhytLZx17xLQjfHh38i4Ou5JyhdEcMG0e0UQKEDGoWN4yQP8T3y4AiGk8D_hdOWsPYrpEJXflmXJ1wR3ELe0PLbw0MkpsvphzQLxUWmWxzPvqyzLf3qIWXSKTUFrHCmR8Wk54oXJBs2x7869o_vD6-axe-l2-hgFZowlxVGocQcpu5e-eq6bER2YDrda5don72QlLTJzuMYgoPjj4KDnjKiYr-kpJMRJkM6o2FgZ3rKCSFfHGz0TJlh0DB7ktkyIo9lLSX8K07v4plYxNl__L6G2l-GtbLhFAmpEvdBUi1DoKJ-S0ts0U-mi22DhFKuFJ5Tozijg%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=44015598a10d421284952c9910c6cb89&_e=Y5ZYw5Li8P_c1Ox8mkLIKNMZSzLVtc8FoFX5TyuFycqLinzGDaIvfFDkhQqr_on-yTZMdSr1aK8hgQ1arw_lv5F4wIwjHB9unDPwhytLZx17xLQjfHh38i4Ou5JyhdEcMG0e0UQKEDGoWN4yQP8T3y4AiGk8D_hdOWsPYrpEJXflmXJ1wR3ELe0PLbw0MkpsvphzQLxUWmWxzPvqyzLf3qIWXSKTUFrHCmR8Wk54oXJBs2x7869o_vD6-axe-l2-rxQEVOo1rSD9OIcUykVkQ1WOqXvcpMXm_m-0mIIWYMQJ4NNDDCjsIQ3m8mTKEQojnZp-6BUsVNGNAiIfeySbLXQe5lNJQphXNopNqhMPYRI_F2wMKrGzzKuvhk_R3zZHbT8cneBWNRGQ7nWcR-iwvNFyERNn9caGdiV9M6jdkT8%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=44015598a10d421284952c9910c6cb89&_e=Y5ZYw5Li8P_c1Ox8mkLIKNMZSzLVtc8FoFX5TyuFycqLinzGDaIvfFDkhQqr_on-yTZMdSr1aK8hgQ1arw_lv5F4wIwjHB9unDPwhytLZx17xLQjfHh38i4Ou5JyhdEcMG0e0UQKEDGoWN4yQP8T3y4AiGk8D_hdOWsPYrpEJXflmXJ1wR3ELe0PLbw0MkpsvphzQLxUWmWxzPvqyzLf3qIWXSKTUFrHCmR8Wk54oXJBs2x7869o_vD6-axe-l2-2z2y5bZ5mtceLPo8Lk0ndNS5v4p0RKBwjKR3gB4haUQY73VbcpOrk5eLvsAC21Zd3Y3cnGZyD8sToUHBvfh676MMfaFMMJl9eQ1621PWHekjyoGk3RdoFfyGtLUKJSZsvEAgikas9wrrGQmfKVJLlL8jqINIbKueVR09JJPOvUQ%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=44015598a10d421284952c9910c6cb89&_e=Y5ZYw5Li8P_c1Ox8mkLIKNMZSzLVtc8FoFX5TyuFycqLinzGDaIvfFDkhQqr_on-yTZMdSr1aK8hgQ1arw_lv5F4wIwjHB9unDPwhytLZx17xLQjfHh38i4Ou5JyhdEcMG0e0UQKEDGoWN4yQP8T3y4AiGk8D_hdOWsPYrpEJXflmXJ1wR3ELe0PLbw0MkpsvphzQLxUWmWxzPvqyzLf3qIWXSKTUFrHCmR8Wk54oXJBs2x7869o_vD6-axe-l2-46Od_y5zw97mN0Wfu-8pl60MWoDguAHdrXNSgJBRnPuQdxlmRGSCohzGUSYvteFAQU82FPdHv96tND2px6vpzKStzBoll9GQ3_jwrg1CIvrkIxT13Bugczo4esjuuplzP5fh1POeDcjl1_U9MoxXd_1p1wqTBASQaokBJbNSSr4%3D)**

clean_body: Who rules whom? A message from our sponsor... | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. name: Chip Roy
subject: “The hand-wringing about Pres. Trump’s nominees needs to STOP!”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND

body:
we need to act fast >>
| Friends, we’re only _beginning_ to see what **unlimited power** looks like: | **BREAKING:** Trump uses first days of Presidency to reverse Biden’s lower prescription costs and advancements for LGBTQ+ people, dismantle DEI efforts, withdraw from the Paris Climate Agreement and World Health Organization, and pardon thousands of January 6th criminals
---
_We’ll call it like we see it:_ Trump, with his MAGA trifecta and SCOTUS’ immunity, is effectively a KING — _and he’s hurting Americans on _both sides_ of the aisle!_

**This is what UNLIMITED power looks like, and it’s WRONG!**

[**We’re urgently calling on Congress to pass the _No Kings Act_ and ensure the President is not above the law, before things get even worse. Add your name ASAP! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250126_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18689%2E878179%2EZVjVJo)
[ADD MY NAME: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250126_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18689%2E878179%2EZVjVJo)
---
Folks, the House is red ❌
The Senate is red ❌
The Supreme Court is red ❌
_And_ the White House is red ❌

**There is currently NOTHING stopping Trump from doing irreversible damage — _except the No Kings Act!_**

[**5,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: Demand Congress pass the “No Kings Act” IMMEDIATELY to save our country, Democracy, and planet! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250126_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18689%2E878179%2EZVjVJo)

name: David Hogg
subject: This is why I’m running for DNC Vice Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’ll make the Democratic Party the strongest it’s been in decades.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250126-1&t=1&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250126-1?refcode=em20250126-1666&amount=5&refcode2=1666_587540_CsWjYc&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)
Peter, we all saw Trump’s dumpster fire of an administration take office this week. But today, I’m thinking about an even bigger issue than Trump himself.
**How did the Democratic Party get to the place where we actually lost to someone like Donald Trump – not once, but _twice_ – and how do we fix it?**
There are many answers to this question. I keep coming back to some big ones:
1\. Democrats have failed at effectively communicating our message.
2\. Our party has prioritized consultants and big donors over working people.
3\. Young people have been sidelined instead of elevated in the discussion.
We can change this, Peter. **I’m running for Vice Chair of the Democratic National Committee** to help lead the fight to transform our party for the better.
**We’re going to make the Democratic Party the strongest it’s been in over half a century.** And we’re going to elect young people across the country to lead the way. But we can only do it together – that’s why your grassroots support matters.
We may not have billionaires like Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg on our side, but I’ve seen firsthand how regular people can come together to make a difference. But it takes _a lot of us._ That’s why we need you, Peter – we can’t do this alone.
**[Will you split a $5 contribution to my campaign for DNC Vice Chair and Leaders We Deserve to revitalize our party and elect the leaders of tomorrow?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250126-1?refcode=em20250126-1666&amount=5&refcode2=1666_587540_CsWjYc&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250126-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250126-1666&refcode2=1666_587540_CsWjYc&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250126-1&t=2&refcode2=1666_587540_CsWjYc&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1666%2E587540%2ECsWjYc)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Time to get to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I am ready to work with President Trump to Make America Great Again. |
---

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2WTtR9ilh4RxinQBLU_fC9V-H-wUlcs_hyTzlP-qoMliQ9zLVslKEjTzx3hLyeU2tHfBDoVJ9EZs9_54GEv6tmU1T1OTMbYv2s0p6hTO21uWZVdxKy4PkxsbSp7VHcPnmcklIYFSpIlwWMce8OSavWr)

We are back. _**America is back.**_

Peter, earlier this month, I was officially sworn in to serve America once again - this time in the United States Senate.

On Monday, I watched as President Donald J. Trump took the Oath of Office to become our 47th President.

It's been a historic month for hardworking Americans. Under our new GOP leadership, we will rein in spending, restore accountability, and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C..

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2XWAIU5O92VCUYtvL-Qc7brQWcq3tbFVeapTeGaHwiiORMR3HhJxYf3ZEPAeNpSzmfMLotBsetINz0qFAvzoAsIfUPdZKvvKgSlH9BTuEW1y-mkayU5_N28xVVcawUNxbZs8wIeYWgkkR5c1D34R16Y)
It's time to get to work - _**but where to start?**_

I want to hear from you, Peter. **[What should be our top priority in the Senate?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2UPxPGZVBBVnRrbU0C5oD_Zd2p-jhZ8rb9yZWB7UMwnYnHjzf1pahgaFci0tD698EGq-ud5my_f7gJQPb7qpfVZ4TRqNoMxtov1v0EUlBFgIAzKNI7_KPegvF0x5PvVnbxIcaGP1fKP28iJrrOnfRF1)**

* Cutting government fat and reining in wasteful spending
* Securing our border to prevent violent criminals and cartels who have infiltrated our country
* Unleashing American energy to lower costs for all Americans
* Protecting the men and women who serve in our Armed Forces to make sure nothing like the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal never happens again
* Or something else

[**BEGIN 2025 TOP PRIORITY POLL ->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2WHa6CxVoYiR7XktvVNP8Os8Uj8ylrSOsQGZkgopXoGilHpQ9d1Iu-pKtHe2GqynhrtBQ5WasrN3q8Ss7TUFlIlv7hE0hXm4TNktUHHTt_G_m57QZxFkEW3aHMf8f8JZGpzl19VPF2lF52oxpAhCHxD)
My mission in the Senate is simple. I was elected to work for you, your family, and every American. It's time to make your daily lives more affordable, keep your family safe, and return common sense to Washington.

I know there's so much work left to undo the last four years, but it's important to me to hear what we should tackle first. **[Please let me know by completing Team Sheehy's 2025 Top Priority Poll before the day is over.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2V04qcI4NJrgTId2hCu6ieh8aBbGdf_u5GPZDZb_IElRFOxDbEJ6qwgCdz0vIH1wfZlegiGLHLVWhhGx6MvXwx8c6i0v34E7qmcPKK8EdAwBX9ev6l2ae_E7qwNzsayqkCqetv0lfl-y1Mf4-4kRNtx)**

Ultimately, your responses make me a better Senator, and help us move America forward. _**I am honored to serve you and Make America Great Again.**_

For America,

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1171e4c5d59f4f4b8dfd3db43f74536f&_e=C3Ksugv_z8ITGhDis6JxU3ZCb1iNMldRgaHxHeXT824cthVraecTgmYluOO1jqkpjRq_PEQI9ovFWAm--H2btJvcr6Kw9fsSvwi4zvV8URMJl5Ga9WdGeyX3RhpK5rJYyGfGwHQPY-HyeR9eQWGNelQ0ngdO8nsivSvsrbeZiAxCrx05M5AkGV1a3FH05VFANOs-DfWwZbww6sUXxi1DjuWzs34vL7N7Vlog71TOpHmwyQVVfSMsIRudnQZkgPXWY7VEJTNrM9yPnYLePl2umZSwMG6zFxY34TB1MrnkSBprlga0BsYNvhx1PS3uPuzXF2Hj_gL00eX8um_TeKH4o4YhsxIYrahOoPLSwA5h9xUgPpwTB7ffuF_xUe4pzT9IEag_hD-3EZKkBIMML_y6ATZRee9asdntpi7-Htwls2WoYToj4cepKTJSKt2J8nl_IBfRFzqmbbn_Lcff1o0iUDXti70Yz8mYltcJhj81T5661m4oOrXPUKug8HPFUDzg1IXZPEUF4xfm7t3nrUX6xP59ji2VIEWpabB60gEF9os_TJqUbp91_Q1sCC0tOL99)

clean_body: I am ready to work with President Trump to Make America Great Again. | We are back. America is back. Peter, earlier this month, I was officially sworn in to serve America once again - this time in the United States Senate. On Monday, I watched as President Donald J. Trump took the Oath of Office to become our 47th President. It's been a historic month for hardworking Americans. Under our new GOP leadership, we will rein in spending, restore accountability, and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C.. It's time to get to work - but where to start? I want to hear from you, Peter. Cutting government fat and reining in wasteful spending Securing our border to prevent violent criminals and cartels who have infiltrated our country Unleashing American energy to lower costs for all Americans Protecting the men and women who serve in our Armed Forces to make sure nothing like the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal never happens again Or something else My mission in the Senate is simple. I was elected to work for you, your family, and every American. It's time to make your daily lives more affordable, keep your family safe, and return common sense to Washington. I know there's so much work left to undo the last four years, but it's important to me to hear what we should tackle first. Ultimately, your responses make me a better Senator, and help us move America forward. I am honored to serve you and Make America Great Again. For America, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - MT | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Some good news after a tough week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This week, Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed key bipartisan gun safety legislation into law.
#

We know it’s been a tough week, so we wanted to share some good news:
**This week, Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed key bipartisan gun safety legislation into law.**
The new legislation will expand Medicaid coverage to include community violence intervention services that will help prevent violence before it occurs. It also includes measures to promote safer firearm storage, enhance Michigan schools' ability to respond swiftly to emergency threats, and require the Michigan State Police to keep dangerous firearms out of communities.
Michigan has been the site of far too many gun violence tragedies, and Governor Whitmer understands the need for meaningful action to keep her constituents safe. We were proud to work with her and our state partners in Michigan to get this legislation passed.
Thank you for supporting GIFFORDS PAC. Without you, progress like this wouldn’t be possible.
\- Team GIFFORDS PAC
* * *

**👋 Hey there, before you go...**

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to [**contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250126-1-b&t=1&akid=9886%2E3935704%2EnC7ZW6)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-jan25.olhjsl&refcode=em250126-1-b&t=2&akid=9886%2E3935704%2EnC7ZW6)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&refcode=em250126-1-b&t=3&akid=9886%2E3935704%2EnC7ZW6)**
---
****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=9886%2E3935704%2EnC7ZW6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Trump and the Republican party are hell-bent on accelerating the climate crisis.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)

Hi there Team, among all the disastrous things Trump has already done in his first week as President, some may have missed his new policies on the environment.
Make no mistake: **Trump and the Republican party are hell-bent on accelerating the climate crisis.**
Their goal is to make their donors from Big Oil as rich as possible at the expense of our communities and our planet. Just look at the executive orders Trump has signed:
* Withdraw the US from the Paris climate agreement, which is meant to keep countries around the world on track to fully tackle carbon emissions.

* Open up protected lands in Alaska to oil and gas drilling, mining and logging, and roll back regulations on fossil fuel extraction on federal lands.

* Revoke incentives put in place by the Biden administration that encourage electric car development and use.

* Halt all new offshore wind energy projects in the US — a crucial source of clean energy.

* Declare a “national energy emergency” that urges federal use of eminent domain and the Defense Production Act to increase dirty fossil fuel extraction.

Friend, we are in the midst of a climate emergency, with each year breaking new records for high heat and intense natural disasters.
These executive orders prove, once again, that Republicans have no care for our future and the future of this planet. They only care about helping their billionaire buddies get ahead now, and making us pay the price later.
I’m not abandoning our movement for urgent climate action and a livable future because I know we have no choice but to keep up the fight. These executive orders may be a big step back, but we have an obligation to rally support for a better, cleaner way forward across this country and put climate action back on the agenda.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

**Wait! Before you click or scroll away...**
Ilhan Omar is coming up on her first fundraising deadline of 2025 in a few days. It’s our first big test of whether or not our grassroots movement has the energy to take on Trump. **[Please, make a contribution to our campaign today and show that you’re with us.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan25.usI49z&refcode=em250126-1-gm&t=2&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)**
**[DONATE $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3080?c0=io-em-jan25.UnpAYI&c1=3.ufE5-L&c2=em250126-1-gm.Hm_70k&t=3&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1465_791427_y1QSgw&akid=1465%2E791427%2Ey1QSgw)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

body:

---
**Adam Schiff is LIZ CHENEY’S #1 FAN!**
---
During the BOMBSHELL hearing to confirm Trump’s pick for Attorney General, **SHIFTY SCHIFF wasted NO TIME bringing his WAR ON TRUMP to the Senate.**
And his first target was PAM BONDI.
But she wasn’t taking the bait — and she absolutely HUMILIATED HIM.
While Schiff bowed to LIZ CHENEY and the RADICAL LEFT MOB, _**here’s what he DIDN’T ask about:**_
---
**> > CRIME RATES**
**> > HOMELESSNESS**
**> > SMASH & GRABS**
---
ALL MAJOR issues that are DESTROYING CALIFORNIA — the state he was elected to represent.
Because Schiff doesn’t care about California.

name: Stop Trump via Our Revolution
subject: He’s gutting the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011?refcode=email-012625_v&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

One week in and Trump’s plan to completely gut and privatize our
government is WELL under way.

He’s moving with lightning speed, replacing experts in government with
Trump loyalists, freezing all regulations and hirings, and dismantling
entire federal agencies.

It’s a dizzying shock and awe strategy that we’ve seen before and that he
TOLD us was coming. The goal is to completely overwhelm his opposition and
try to make us lose focus. We will not be shaken. We are clear-eyed in
this fight.

Here’s the plan: our team is working around the clock building a massive
Citizen Army in every Congressional District and on Capitol Hill to block
Trump’s radical policies and pressure Congress to stop the complete
takedown of our government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]We’ve already recruited 30,000 top activists to join us, and strategy
meetings are happening as we speak with our contingent in DC. But an
effort like this takes major resources – can you rush a donation now to
help?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

For months, Trump and Musk have made their plan clear – a complete
corporate takeover of our government. And now they’re moving FAST to gut
the regulations they detest and replace government workers who could stand
in their way with loyalists who will help them wreak havoc from within.

That’s why on day one Trump paved the way to be able to fire tens of
thousands of civil servants. He ordered 160 key staff members at the
National Security Council, which include diplomats and military officials,
to turn in their devices and badges and head home. These are the experts
we need should a domestic or foreign crisis hit. And it’s happening all
across the government.

We won’t lie. This is terrifying. Thankfully, legal challenges are already
moving full steam ahead – but we can’t rely on them alone to save us.

The fact is if we’re going to stop Trump and his billionaire backers from
completely gutting our government, it’s going to take a massive army of
citizens to stand in their way.

We know many folks are feeling overwhelmed, but Our Revolution and our
movement will not sit this out. We’re training up a Citizen Army of
thousands ready to mobilize at a moment’s notice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-012625nd&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]We’ll be ready to take to the streets and to lobby every member of
Congress — Democrat or Republican — to push back against Trump’s corporate
takeover. But we need to quickly raise the resources to make it happen –
can you help?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7575%2E5885482%2Ek8IjLu ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

Donald Trump is ABUSING his presidential power to roll back the rights of Americans, carry out his personal agenda, and destabilize democracy!

body:
Complete the DOGE survey today

|
---
| | | **Waste

Fraud

Inefficiency**

Peter, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

I need your help today, Peter. **[Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0a9b0fa73a243b0a7bded02f8b34175&_e=F5KYU4w_yn_eezcS_T8d8VrKA8OpvNYkJslLf40XPx64r6nUQMVD7RjiQSi87WDTk7zlP7bpc_5GjtvphavrbmDm2-zA0dfs3kr4wqEa9Dk-L-d5S28P1pIQGMJECIUG9oA7gTv9iWeXvTEp4iUaPHdm896TUcdoA1Nh4ot1PtvU54WoBvZuZi9TG98yYBbhYH2iOb5YvHr9xw6je6MnJtthzgV7-czKiSX2swr1iC2rpEX0iAwO9_srLBoREm59GLl-nJoyPphIxfl2STkw9JLJKpl894eA3Ncz3P1fW0CQtdDfk6nKqWvfjb3Y0nPVLUZa7kDVFjcV1e6Yq3XUxAs0EEo8rqrTwuo6Y4JvaPdFXRnAf1U00mogY1OcDrW7zms7mG3b-USSvQtAVZMl8dvIflGyKkXxuptf3lUr-zvhwYhc4kXNVdf-zR24CMFjzzLdymjPg_9M9g3fbRbP98WBmbOLl4cu77tiN2PQXBk0VDgIQh_UGFczmPd_TJLd "Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?")**

name: Team DASS
subject: Here’s the truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101014055/524637095/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk4YTIwOS0wYWRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwcYpM69khDtIoMdK-juMdgnd2oLWFd4KRCuP1LVrIM=)
Friend, Here’s the truth: Donald Trump is going to do a lot over the next four years. And most of those things will be outright ridiculous – designed to grab headlines and distract from the true harm he’s causing. We won’t waste time emailing you about every single one of his outrageous stunts designed to divide and distract us. _You’d be getting 20 emails a day if we did that..._ **Instead, we’re focused on what really matters: standing up for democracy, defending our institutions,_and electing Democratic Secretaries of State._** We’re now in a critical electoral cycle that will shape the future of our democracy. There are **26** Secretary of State races on the ballot, including four in Democratic-held states that Donald Trump won in 2024: Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. This will be a democracy-defining moment for our country, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. That’s why we need you to help us lay the groundwork for the road ahead: [**This will be a long, hard battle for our democracy, and we need all the resources we can get to fight back. Can you chip in $3 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101014056/524637096/38783912?refcode=em-1.26.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk4YTIwOS0wYWRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwcYpM69khDtIoMdK-juMdgnd2oLWFd4KRCuP1LVrIM=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101014057/524637097/38783912?refcode=em-1.26.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk4YTIwOS0wYWRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwcYpM69khDtIoMdK-juMdgnd2oLWFd4KRCuP1LVrIM=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Here’s the truth: Donald Trump is going to do a lot over the next four years. And most of those things will be outright ridiculous – designed to grab headlines and distract from the true harm he’s causing. We won’t waste time emailing you about every single one of his outrageous stunts designed to divide and distract us. You’d be getting 20 emails a day if we did that... Instead, we’re focused on what really matters: standing up for democracy, defending our institutions,and electing Democratic Secretaries of State. We’re now in a critical electoral cycle that will shape the future of our democracy. There are 26 Secretary of State races on the ballot, including four in Democratic-held states that Donald Trump won in 2024: Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. name: David Horowitz
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89432b96c9f74fdb87f98c54a4c3b4b3&_e=GIQJcevU3n9WS9dMu60FnCJHqR-nTbTDp_1JgGhjKRKV9OdxBKP8yAzXxC-vBad2zAU4qfizte6Dtv0JU3G7t0lKvFuhPHeIcT5zcNLP7ubOEaaI68DFxnJwLmU1_WqILgGBfTfoII72maTOdEVs2dIfOu2okkf6XY0pHbb3Kc988mCsJ5oawVLu4mYM6HXvsgPRiqG9dkEMQrmqngsp99J07FHK_CQvlUS9nH7UGi5PXaRSZXwzGDL_CCL9t5zi6agVcyaur5624uKgidOi0RDLKHocPEH_1Ymg3t2Dw2gHAGoLZ1v9QLjzhsx4xOTBoawRTuiqfk_Y9VX4BaRy1WUOjHWIsORtO2gdJ8ski0FqNSXMVkvKjuQfJvek9WqyOVbYxE1480nvNnPv06TqJg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89432b96c9f74fdb87f98c54a4c3b4b3&_e=GIQJcevU3n9WS9dMu60FnCJHqR-nTbTDp_1JgGhjKRKV9OdxBKP8yAzXxC-vBad2zAU4qfizte6Dtv0JU3G7t0lKvFuhPHeIcT5zcNLP7ubOEaaI68DFxnJwLmU1_WqILgGBfTfoII72maTOdEVs2dIfOu2okkf6XY0pHbb3Kc988mCsJ5oawVLu4mYM6HXvsgPRiqG9dkEMQrmqngsp99J07FHK_CQvlUS9nH7UGi5PXaRSZXwzGDL_CCL9t5ziP2uUev7AFJOr0_hf_nm2iAaOSsCDdYnkyc2JuZrqRmhBW0L82WkjkktX1VxhvMajr6prBIVS7R6LPWeD8JedzVCJAyDaey4YvyZncXI93fYNSN7SFPg-Kxn8NhMKrxLmImAlpyxlMTWy-3uiw0ycEg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89432b96c9f74fdb87f98c54a4c3b4b3&_e=GIQJcevU3n9WS9dMu60FnCJHqR-nTbTDp_1JgGhjKRKV9OdxBKP8yAzXxC-vBad2zAU4qfizte6Dtv0JU3G7t0lKvFuhPHeIcT5zcNLP7ubOEaaI68DFxnJwLmU1_WqILgGBfTfoII72maTOdEVs2dIfOu2okkf6XY0pHbb3Kc988mCsJ5oawVLu4mYM6HXvsgPRiqG9dkEMQrmqngsp99J07FHK_CQvlUS9nH7UGi5PXaRSZXwzGDL_CCL9t5ziwRTz_yu_Q6bD-fvO9UVtHrXb8EFGDJC0WGpqxM95OxUX2BGyxZE3iBKYRiLHIeMIsIVtp6Q5836vCGC4bVq13MbNsvKjrFXeI7ruaXRgBGOFYudkttkuiLgH829vweex_B_f2VBWVTkGTeWwhKK-nQ%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89432b96c9f74fdb87f98c54a4c3b4b3&_e=GIQJcevU3n9WS9dMu60FnCJHqR-nTbTDp_1JgGhjKRKV9OdxBKP8yAzXxC-vBad2zAU4qfizte6Dtv0JU3G7t0lKvFuhPHeIcT5zcNLP7ubOEaaI68DFxnJwLmU1_WqILgGBfTfoII72maTOdEVs2dIfOu2okkf6XY0pHbb3Kc988mCsJ5oawVLu4mYM6HXvsgPRiqG9dkEMQrmqngsp99J07FHK_CQvlUS9nH7UGi5PXaRSZXwzGDL_CCL9t5zio5KTsVsEvyEdR4LjEDoe_X8f-vQb0BLcVHkFQwIc-FbqzSPyRqOjqmqYeoAHnmw1urWBbw1jOk7izTlolQTog09HniE71bY2LnTkVDcb89qjz3QEuLElVpeSj4r_c1xB6jX2RxgnIrpTr6Yw2tHvdg%3D%3D)

name: Royce White
subject: Only the truth can relieve my anxiety
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
We must put mental health at the forefront of American discussion | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUCpdDBDXSsgpwLyKzZ4f4IxubKyMsBJzkHBPP8r7n5q677RADzu7VFef_H3DO6fTBYQf3dXnFJPJSxk0pWmFLPR63O6yYf-SJBsi3-lwe2qINlF3NQFN-Xj5DbE3LZdq4vMsbR-711tu0vE0pWpa41g%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**Only the truth can relieve my anxiety.**

I’ve struggled with mental health and anxiety all my life. When I played in the NBA, I put my career at risk to stand up and fight for better mental health policies for players. There was a different stigma about mental health back then, and I was nearly crucified by the Industrial Media Complex for standing up for what I believed in.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUq48pTXFnykD_ESMAKCo1bUqkJ0bIkHxuEUFIHahhjKoR-zgRtHavDJod6LQJvWmzKI0paDcXnPXaRdam8AZf_rS-lgJ7wAGhmPti5uSnO8q1AyxcAJH51QQXa_oGMzbWT1vPN0r5YcChX7wOmyjrCg%3D%3D)
It wasn’t until I woke up to the truth that I was able to manage my anxiety.

Faith and the fruits of faith are the way our Free People have traditionally increased their health.

For the last fifty years, we have experimented with our freedoms, squandered our safety, and moved far from the spiritual world of our parents and grandparents. Our world is dominated by materialism. This entire experiment has been an abject failure.

| [ **LIBERATE OUR MENTAL HEALTH** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUUkZ-mlyohFGNlAeLNp6Qmum4tjf1oZp7cx_iaaqwip3sNS-A-Mu0ZBoi2o9RbKNvp16clzYQoo88YLoF9D8Qkn4bcHs6XooSDu37JHdif6-1DwFVzCxCMs5QqcthdAgXqtJACrgsmQhrrila0vnVOw%3D%3D)
---

The explosion of mental health issues is evidence of this failure. A life of meaning is available to all Free People here in America – and I say this both as a sufferer and as your potential Senator.

_We must create it together, and this is an act of our combined will as much as any policy or procedure._

**We are a community united by our ideas. We are one people, under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all.**

Now, it’s up to us, The People, to unite together and embrace our sense of community.

When Radical Leftists hurl ungrounded insults at Republicans, like calling us Nazis or trash, it further divides our nation. We need more America-First Senators leading our country forward.

_That’s why I’m running for Senate against Radical Leftist Tina Smith. She’s been an Obama puppet for her entire tenure as a United States Senator. It’s long overdue time to elect Minnesota’s first Black Republican Senator to lead our country through the mental health crisis._

[**Can I count on you to chip in just $10 before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUSP56iJLDg1ydCugzuaS7Eppd0rZYlEtaE3CtR1i_A3SsJtx7O0yg1qvp5EIc-nAfxdMo4EVcBJWZ4UudSbhNUXE_MT49DiTMhTMZIR0A6Waj_9nrksD4C7-YBemGArOFbStrRYv578cSvr5ylr0_IA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUpHn6y_gdA14JM8nIutWpQEYBvDJ5lUBBB4gbU6FFIs-tCDs8ONNQmW0rwzmect3D5NgGxdYXNI_ZeXXqsTm7EQ3UD2gwDVjJaBRWqsY6-1k3EfKKQMe1aZhlYIi5do8FNve7ZYK5AcmaHU5_HMo7CA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a1b9d0a437644b60be7c0b1285f8871d&_e=D4HQzWrgAgtvDAqdudVTa9LVpejciUWmAI5LWBssgBVZumHgdfp__gU_ZjnC2vc-qUJUSYCl33EEAxydhyQzGiRC8WPmauffIydpt4MavVqoVU1nBmzq1EmMmbIaBDU_QjXechgkFA7ftYbIi0K0d0b71K0oj6IPucwgOP864C9tb5DinMLvJdt7xdJhSrIUSNa0ZesrmzW2P-NxpyhMfCM5qmo3hMyvESYF4s8NaXpvNIBHxYXbQnQut7CvmUN-Pl97ICvL1X5cicDPK5J-K2vh6BsnfbCJ4xQLXCNIj_2Gv56-N_jNk-k_3bWOpWb-TfsObKuLoP0-lsznA4Cpaw%3D%3D)

body:

---
Elise Stefanik’s confirmation hearing to be President Trump’s Ambassador to the United Nations was this week.

Once Stefanik is confirmed, she’ll resign her seat in Congress, _**and the race for the special election will officially begin.**_

This is a critical moment for our team. When that special election is called, we will have less than 90 days to campaign and reach voters in every corner of this district.

This could be our first chance to fight back and shrink the Republican House majority, so it’s never been more important for us to come together to support Blake and make sure we have strong momentum heading into the special election. [**Can we count on you to split a donation between Fight for Reform to help elect state and local Democrats our campaign today to help us flip this seat? »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59022?t=7&akid=22792%2E4449941%2EY5O9oi) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Blake Gendebien will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59023?t=8&akid=22792%2E4449941%2EY5O9oi)

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46675e3399841d4a57cf1bff4a8a518&_e=HbhC5LmNTIYUqFIEiQT2bskwhNfs00LXRUi_Tz1dnP_TbndQOjV_b9-4sCAMMxmirWht4bZJWcq92G5Mx74xlnvTv1xGU4zwDUNGcLXAWsXV9syvJJtMsk-fdW-kuZAyAtyZnWqBsX7BQumgZgGbn55mvpA7h5AVc9QXVRrx12UMRIHKIVpvq2ww_BT9e-kKdEBYjEc3LHSuxh4qyZmrkkQvJHnX8AhlC2hE8lHx8IJtyoSJQPvwhWgGwUR5iEWYqIrvqKsVBippbsuWXoHFU-alslS0xu9FRSiM7O_FFfz1RtunVA8dZO29UgI6ToZ6kxjZPQsmVHn5pkCuMAQjMosbHpZrcZhQsqSnHgAdFfUiukmUaDsBDpXCT6dQQSTx)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46675e3399841d4a57cf1bff4a8a518&_e=HbhC5LmNTIYUqFIEiQT2bskwhNfs00LXRUi_Tz1dnP_TbndQOjV_b9-4sCAMMxmirWht4bZJWcq92G5Mx74xlnvTv1xGU4zwDUNGcLXAWsXV9syvJJtMsk-fdW-kuZAyAtyZnWqBsX7BQumgZgGbn55mvpA7h5AVc9QXVRrx12UMRIHKIVpvq2ww_BT9e-kKdEBYjEc3LHSuxh4qyZmrkj1YQwbPw7o60-isH7Lyv7DE5Nd99c9KIboveln1uQKdMbMMHPKs2YsVpox8h9lzKmqpfjxJLuJE5paQYYSfWEaEYkOImEU9qfVRVOICbyAD7lbktqbyi_YY9J81Ji0xU2VWsOoVuybn1NYo1ykVSp5qYw9URNdECFaI54Sf1zwP)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46675e3399841d4a57cf1bff4a8a518&_e=HbhC5LmNTIYUqFIEiQT2bskwhNfs00LXRUi_Tz1dnP_TbndQOjV_b9-4sCAMMxmirWht4bZJWcq92G5Mx74xlnvTv1xGU4zwDUNGcLXAWsXV9syvJJtMsk-fdW-kuZAyAtyZnWqBsX7BQumgZgGbn55mvpA7h5AVc9QXVRrx12UMRIHKIVpvq2ww_BT9e-kKdEBYjEc3LHSuxh4qyZmrkmjXGowbmwCRh0SntS6zjqkkGUs-QSLCvaVxVzc6TT3bm25u6OIs0OtpDkSz3l16m5Pe6fTyE_EwCLP_EVVk3lgeW1HdqUzaANORkvVq5Bd2P95wixKWhbChVmiRyaSCuPJoa3aA9zGW2-G82nEC4LbtGRFGJPtVzDn4n8hpv1Pt)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46675e3399841d4a57cf1bff4a8a518&_e=HbhC5LmNTIYUqFIEiQT2bskwhNfs00LXRUi_Tz1dnP_TbndQOjV_b9-4sCAMMxmirWht4bZJWcq92G5Mx74xlnvTv1xGU4zwDUNGcLXAWsXV9syvJJtMsk-fdW-kuZAyAtyZnWqBsX7BQumgZgGbn55mvpA7h5AVc9QXVRrx12UMRIHKIVpvq2ww_BT9e-kKdEBYjEc3LHSuxh4qyZmrkla5V6D__FyzkQLB9UXpPiS9vZj5KqkLnlpCbAGXCsB4K9vJproRKqXPLmn_3O93eZtR3TJhdulbw-tu8gFPyaEGFldYmdHJusPLZ0yAVdDJoFZMenYPW-86VLIS37apkNN8VG2w7wfh0jExKgxgI0HaqXGqdqlj0pEBvK-uy9Ak)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. | Friend of Life, As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames. My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims. Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California. Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside. In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need. EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary. This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you. Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time. For Life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
Reserve your DVD box set

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d26c36191fb34f0f8380d8eeb344a959&_e=ZfipiJiGPyew5yOgtQJ4of4yEbReROKohLR3ScPYpvqhQFbJqy2JK22rW9oDGnW96DFnpbRkyFxzAwLaxJRX4XeSZf8UdshdHExH11iWy9AWxlt9ySEDclqNnjAfnKl6v5E6FJhSaoBgIGPQbVr_NrOsGwkUXtFlClcslPotzwroVV4Z2w41WGvbM4VOSPFw7TDEczoCCMN9nf7j5SQ2RmkAIinnMLzfnJ3A6P_tV79mcZuV9_I9TNQd5xWu_vbde_RDfJ39u2L-BeWFPobBWcTHIimbY5CQ_W0xns3-eJS9YsfhsC9INy7OVA3beajHqy5fjPJmM_qsYAlGH91YjOidYhYjQ7NAC3e9DuvxcIEoMEa--jja7KDdORTjtIZBrguAhXt9N9Qsd0eDVkEhGzxiQ-4NAb9jc_W9Zi24VONRUfZcmMIhVKmmN19RRRw8)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d26c36191fb34f0f8380d8eeb344a959&_e=ZfipiJiGPyew5yOgtQJ4of4yEbReROKohLR3ScPYpvqhQFbJqy2JK22rW9oDGnW96DFnpbRkyFxzAwLaxJRX4XeSZf8UdshdHExH11iWy9AWxlt9ySEDclqNnjAfnKl6v5E6FJhSaoBgIGPQbVr_NrOsGwkUXtFlClcslPotzwroVV4Z2w41WGvbM4VOSPFw7TDEczoCCMN9nf7j5SQ2RmkAIinnMLzfnJ3A6P_tV79mcZuV9_I9TNQd5xWu_vbde_RDfJ39u2L-BeWFPobBWeWL2NlJOEdSwDvMC5Pe0vkvJz8mFCOdyhacJKZNVRpu_XAQm_xRBih1VhGUEr-Aw_f01qnSVMlprIpuqjcuR9IM3Ap7p43lc5YNtqbFHpyWispf2-jHZx1fhCjpFsbgyJIUhO_dP3gLPMGbauTxLezOmKHnwgRzmI_8Bj5QaQqX)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d26c36191fb34f0f8380d8eeb344a959&_e=ZfipiJiGPyew5yOgtQJ4of4yEbReROKohLR3ScPYpvqhQFbJqy2JK22rW9oDGnW96DFnpbRkyFxzAwLaxJRX4XeSZf8UdshdHExH11iWy9AWxlt9ySEDclqNnjAfnKl6v5E6FJhSaoBgIGPQbVr_NrOsGwkUXtFlClcslPotzwroVV4Z2w41WGvbM4VOSPFw7TDEczoCCMN9nf7j5SQ2RmkAIinnMLzfnJ3A6P_tV79mcZuV9_I9TNQd5xWu_vbde_RDfJ39u2L-BeWFPobBWdD62iB1z5tHr8z4CwlKjfTVBovcLoTfduMeywDr6Ro0LupxxmLKXRhWiBnkpdiJuhxUQQBGNGVjhAhKn1PXHW3KsHWklG-NUK0RC25e3Gc1nxi93Y_wBF_y2IS3Dh65sV5bypPBK3cX-rpseyJY15Ap90k16OEDn-9NiKCzHuOm)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d26c36191fb34f0f8380d8eeb344a959&_e=ZfipiJiGPyew5yOgtQJ4of4yEbReROKohLR3ScPYpvqhQFbJqy2JK22rW9oDGnW96DFnpbRkyFxzAwLaxJRX4XeSZf8UdshdHExH11iWy9AWxlt9ySEDclqNnjAfnKl6v5E6FJhSaoBgIGPQbVr_NrOsGwkUXtFlClcslPotzwroVV4Z2w41WGvbM4VOSPFw7TDEczoCCMN9nf7j5SQ2RmkAIinnMLzfnJ3A6P_tV79mcZuV9_I9TNQd5xWu_vbde_RDfJ39u2L-BeWFPobBWTV70egCqLMS3PGg2GobDdUoBTQp8mpJbjAS2FaRf1BGiQByOBDc2lVW9Yh65kgwPMSAIPq1NC1CnWAZTPoIxhNYCwCamGJn6tBpzIo-dJBHOUT2Y8vrQXSNA1eJGMFvlokpjRb6JRWK3JV6qkd8oCJu0TP1tvwh9gPeshsN1eVd).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=d26c36191fb34f0f8380d8eeb344a959&_t=b6FkgMDljNu7H2PZ_u2N5j_XIhBamQljE4z7WZ34YUkUOhBrLViH6LyL9SIMQDSxyg7jeyy7I5iZB8u-2m1qvD9nTZ1qosvyUHRynvDYT5inEwbKfuqiVWAUdtLrbp-f)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Josh Weil
subject: I’m a teacher running for Congress against someone who wants to ban books.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101017270/524647218/-491556796?refcode=250114_Serve_Weil_Teacher&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTAwNThjMS0xMGRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YM6ek8MxQh-dV52IaweGAXSNy3rNS5LiKupImdN0D0=)

Team, If you and I haven’t met yet, my name is Josh Weil. I’m a public school teacher and proud Democrat running in the Special Election for Florida’s 6th Congressional District— _**the first major election of 2025.**_ **Here’s the bottom line:** I’m a proud teacher who has always encouraged my students to seek knowledge anywhere they can find it. Meanwhile, my MAGA Extremist opponent is a proponent of Florida’s DISASTROUS book bans. **The difference couldn’t be more stark.** I’ve spent my career in classrooms, working with at-risk youth and fighting to give every student a chance to succeed, no matter their background. But now, I’m running for Congress to take that fight to Washington—because my opponent has built his career on taking opportunities away. **My opponent is a vocal supporter of book bans and other extreme MAGA policies designed to stifle free thought and limit opportunities for kids like the ones I’ve dedicated my life to teaching.** This isn’t just a policy disagreement—it’s about the world we’re leaving for the next generation. I’m running because I believe our democracy is worth fighting for, and because our kids deserve a future free from MAGA censorship and fear. This is going to be an uphill battle, but recent special elections have shown that Democrats can win when we work together. [**We’ve got less than 100 days to flip this seat and stop MAGA extremism in its tracks. Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today -- split with Serve America -- to help us win this fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101017271/524647219/-423390815?refcode=250114_Serve_Weil_Teacher&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTAwNThjMS0xMGRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YM6ek8MxQh-dV52IaweGAXSNy3rNS5LiKupImdN0D0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101017272/524647220/-2031701896?refcode=250114_Serve_Weil_Teacher&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTAwNThjMS0xMGRjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YM6ek8MxQh-dV52IaweGAXSNy3rNS5LiKupImdN0D0=) Thank you for believing in this campaign. | | Peter,

**_FIRST→_** Donald Trump laid the groundwork for overturning Roe v. Wade, opening the doors for widespread attacks on reproductive rights.

**_THEN→_** less than 12 hours after taking office, his administration took down reproductiverights.gov — a federal resource for reproductive healthcare.

**_NOW→_** his recent executive orders reference “conception,” laying the groundwork for fetal personhood, which would have sweeping consequences for abortion care, birth control, IVF, and beyond.

And while Trump accelerates his attacks, Senate Republicans are right there with him, introducing sham legislation to criminalize abortion providers.

We’ve already seen the devastating impact of attacks on reproductive rights across the country, and anti-choice extremists are determined to take things even further. **[Trump will attack reproductive healthcare on every front, and he won’t stop unless we stand in his way. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, FIRST→ Donald Trump laid the groundwork for overturning Roe v. Wade, opening the doors for widespread attacks on reproductive rights. THEN→ less than 12 hours after taking office, his administration took down reproductiverights.gov — a federal resource for reproductive healthcare. NOW→ his recent executive orders reference “conception,” laying the groundwork for fetal personhood, which would have sweeping consequences for abortion care, birth control, IVF, and beyond. And while Trump accelerates his attacks, Senate Republicans are right there with him, introducing sham legislation to criminalize abortion providers. We’ve already seen the devastating impact of attacks on reproductive rights across the country, and anti-choice extremists are determined to take things even further. | | Thanks for all your help, Peter. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**There are _15 special elections_** **over the next three months**. With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. **_9 states_** **are holding elections that require our immediate attention.** The MAGA movement could easily pour _millions of dollars_ into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. **_$7 from you_****is all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania.** [Can we count on you to chip in $7 before Friday's deadline to help state Dems defeat extreme Republicans in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPf8W_B0xptJi6SYPCTnYZrClrz2GM8blt42TRUDcTumdEwK02TJ1w93Nnb2J1tdLfnkziAxtT0KlfgfE3bAW-u1ILg8eD0izAkAJCotK2mhyxJ4Y3Ah_gFytjbFdz8OMPlN02Y6hGU1sPggOziuSh5vEIFRG_nsaRCBParIx39HSGEbtBf9mCWJj5prXpMgZPFHJm7-iRzGpZnuVZgo0ok8wjwqrA8sDpf-FW9XtCnuR_V3A-qknpGhX0rwZSRmwLkWTbQ9bUJhLmVMW-lSQn8nAxLjKpyrbfDwOx_wAGAHy7Nlx_FHcL687x-HIOJhWeN_gulimSne4AelV7KHaR5L__x2iY1vay2nKWPrAaS6zQ/4dh/oj1XdoWVS4CzciHEBCgofQ/h0/h001.pAR504ovbAFy5BinV1aWhLDnXYs32tvrNpNmMJ3e0SE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Sen. Brian Lenney
subject: where we're at (& where we're goin)...
body:
RE: (MIGA, MAGA) |
---
| | Take a look at this...

Instead of hitting you with a 12-page email nobody asked for, I made a quick video.

[**Watch it here (but you're free not to, I’m just trying to be helpful)

**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=5a60098dbc&e=dea908e0fe "watch it")**[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=670ba9fa92&e=dea908e0fe)**

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S. **

Did you join me on X yet (it's way cooler than Facebook)?

[https://x.com/brian_lenney](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b0ea0132ee&e=dea908e0fe "Join Lenney on X")

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=d80645224e).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753
