And just like that, Trump destroyed years of our advocacy and organizing work to end gun violence in our country.

**But I know Maxwell, and I know he will NEVER give up on the fight to save lives and end gun violence. We just need to keep him in Congress so he can make the White House Office of Gun Violence prevention a reality again AND make it permanent so no president can abolish it in the future.**[**_Can you rush $27 to his campaign to fuel this fight to save lives and restore the Office of Gun Violence Prevention? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hD4tjMk6VFq8HARruy6eTQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpeQpaP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI1MDEyNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9kYXZpZC1ob2dnLWd2cF9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yc0I4TXhaUUNEUUFYdm82Q29ISXgzUjVuT2UmcmVmY29kZTI9MnNCOE14WlFDRFFBWHZvNkNvSEl4M1I1bk9lJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJzQjhNeFpRQ0RRQVh2bzZDb0hJeDNSNW5PZVcDc3BjQgpnjluFlmfrWikuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Of course Republicans blocked the bill, but thankfully, President Biden stepped in and established the office himself.

But now, all the progress we’ve made is at risk, and we know this is just the start. **Trump is going to choose guns over people nonstop over the next four years, so we _really_ need gun violence prevention champions like Maxwell in Congress to keep our movement strong.**

subject: Outrageous News
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101018215/524651095/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjNkYjI1YmItMTdkYy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tNTYcwk3Gj1FMT2JkIojCwJ931cCPjfz4g9AKLAEqY4=&emci=f90f8546-9ddb-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=63db25bb-17dc-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Look at that headline, “Will SCOTUS help Trump make America great again.”
The answer is YES.
SCOTUS has already created immunity for Trump to keep him out of prison.
SCOTUS has already robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions.
Now, Trump is teeing up their next job: legalize discrimination against transgender Americans.
The job of the Supreme Court is to call balls and strikes. Not be a tool in the toolbox of MAGA America.
This is what happens when you have lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and no accountability.
But with your help, that’s about to change!
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, Sheldon Whitehouse, and a total of 75 members of the House and Senate co-sponsoring the TERM Act, which would enact 18-year term limits for justices.
We need majorities in both houses.
Will you help us back candidates pledging to support the TERM Act?

SCOTUS has already robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions. Now, Trump is teeing up their next job: legalize discrimination against transgender Americans. The job of the Supreme Court is to call balls and strikes. Not be a tool in the toolbox of MAGA America. This is what happens when you have lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and no accountability. But with your help, that’s about to change! **Governor Kotek prepares Oregon for impacts expected from the Trump administration.**

**Governor Kotek gets praise for her work on housing!**

Praise came from a spokesperson for a major home building company, who said the Governor's reforms are making it easier to build more housing and reduce construction costs.

name: the EMILYs List Campaigns team
subject: Wisconsin's state Supreme Court race →
body:
We can't risk reversing all the progress we made. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101018823/524652976/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE155_20250126_WISCOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1055628&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRiMjViYi0xN2RjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhRHNoX2uTDDJxybe4OfJhmNrY8gIA7EZ56n9YHtXWE=) Peter,

In 2023, with the support of the EMILYs List community, **Justice Janet Protasiewicz** flipped a seat on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court — creating a pro-choice majority and helping to protect fundamental rights in the state.

This year, a new seat on the court is vacant, and _the majority is up for grabs again._

**That's why we've endorsed Judge Susan Crawford to hold the pro-choice majority and safeguard abortion access in this critical swing state.**

We can't risk reversing all the progress we've made since electing Justice Protasiewicz.

[**So please, donate now to help elect pro-choice champions like Judge Susan Crawford who will defend our fundamental rights:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101018824/524652977/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE155_20250126_WISCOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1055628&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRiMjViYi0xN2RjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhRHNoX2uTDDJxybe4OfJhmNrY8gIA7EZ56n9YHtXWE=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101018825/524652978/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE155_20250126_WISCOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1055628&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRiMjViYi0xN2RjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhRHNoX2uTDDJxybe4OfJhmNrY8gIA7EZ56n9YHtXWE=)
---
Susan Crawford's race _will_ determine whether the court has a liberal or conservative majority — and consequently, whether the rights of Wisconsinites remain protected for years to come.

Her opponent is anti-choice extremist Brad Schimel, who, as Wisconsin's attorney general, attacked reproductive freedom, let thousands of rape kits go untested, and fought to protect the GOP's gerrymandered maps.
[**It's never been more important to have fair, impartial justices like Susan Crawford on our highest courts. So, please, donate now to support candidates who will fight to defend our rights:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101018826/524652979/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE155_20250126_WISCOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1055628&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRiMjViYi0xN2RjLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhRHNoX2uTDDJxybe4OfJhmNrY8gIA7EZ56n9YHtXWE=)

clean_body: We can't risk reversing all the progress we made. | = Peter, In 2023, with the support of the EMILYs List community, Justice Janet Protasiewicz flipped a seat on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court — creating a pro-choice majority and helping to protect fundamental rights in the state. This year, a new seat on the court is vacant, and the majority is up for grabs again. That's why we've endorsed Judge Susan Crawford to hold the pro-choice majority and safeguard abortion access in this critical swing state. We can't risk reversing all the progress we've made since electing Justice Protasiewicz. = | = Susan Crawford's race will determine whether the court has a liberal or conservative majority — and consequently, whether the rights of Wisconsinites remain protected for years to come. Her opponent is anti-choice extremist Brad Schimel, who, as Wisconsin's attorney general, attacked reproductive freedom, let thousands of rape kits go untested, and fought to protect the GOP's gerrymandered maps. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: A major priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
The movement to end the Electoral College is making progress, friend: Minnesota joined the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and Maine's state legislature is working to join as well.
If you don't remember -- The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. 17 states plus DC have now joined.
Minnesota brought 10 electoral votes, and Maine 4, now accounting for 209 Electoral College votes of the 270 needed to win the election and totaling 78% of what is needed to make the popular vote the law of the land. Minnesota passed a slate of voting rights protections alongside joining the compact as well, which represents huge progress.
Whether it's through the NPVIC or one of the other legal alternatives, ending the Electoral College forever is a big priority.
We are going to make this happen! Keep the momentum going and put us over the top so we can end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012625_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012625_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012625_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012625_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012625_1&amount=35]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. State legislatures in Nevada, Michigan, and more are heeding the call and also considering bills to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact.
The Electoral College is the biggest tool that opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection by any means necessary.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
Thank you for your commitment,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=kVsUWqFnRUQjyI%2BscMj2BQBfXgtGyIrXU006SMpQvzr3gopdq%2FzGodHfUcIKeToafJmTYrw5F37%2Bf1sCcxp3KlazkgBY4mXtvpt9PgG7vhgwmFhNGn3QcoHJZcqkS8Ryj4FxDadpQtUInweTj2yg8edZ2rhM51C%2FvPRlEzYR%2BYBiLs3F%2F2q7n5khWJtLbd8yZKOjvFb%2BPli6Lb3Z48yxoF8ksPnT7Q0owrSWcDk8kaRNoDWWtRCGELzoxHiHjWm76D0ZKEWv0bg1TMmDXmaR%2Bf40FU4%2F%2BqMC1t7WyQmPv65b7xOql5yZld9bnjkbzyhQxSKfkSzKQduPEmQ%2FQteAqev8sKhLhuUCU3flLoj91hdaiYOZmmszpvuV5S0uMZfeZWQY5Ceba1DlR7hotAWi9CEdSfysEzBrwRF6gvOYzb0%3D .

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Crypto spent big on the 2024 elections, and it’s paying off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Cryptocurrency is back with a vengeance,
Peter.

The crypto lobby accounted for almost half of all political donations in
the 2024 election cycle, spending big on both Republicans and corporate
Democrats. Crypto executives, companies, investors, and super PACs gave
tens of millions to Donald Trump alone.

Why? To buy political influence, prevent regulation that protects
consumers, and maximize their profits. And it’s already working.

Trump appointed pro-crypto hedge fund manager Scott Bessent to lead the
Treasury Department, and last week, he signed an executive order promoting
crypto and exploring a national stockpile, promising to de-regulate it
even further. Trump’s crypto and artificial intelligence czar, venture
capitalist David Sacks, declared “The war on crypto is over.”

Not only that, but Trump himself is trying to profit off of the crypto
industry while in office, launching the sale of his own meme coin, a
volatile product that could cause economic harm to the consumers he’s
selling it to. It’s his latest way of trying to profit off of his
presidency and rip off everyday people.

It’s not just Republicans like Trump propping up crypto in exchange for
campaign contributions: many establishment Democrats including the
incoming leader of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee Sen.
Kirsten Gillibrand have taken money from this industry and support
legislation to protect it from appropriate regulation.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250126?refcode=em20250126-36366&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36366_1203867_WmQjoz&akid=36366%2E1203867%2EWmQjoz ]This is exactly why we need more working-class progressives in Congress
committed to standing up to the crypto industry. Will you support our 2026
candidate recruitment efforts with a grassroots donation of
$5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250126?refcode=em20250126-36366&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36366_1203867_WmQjoz&akid=36366%2E1203867%2EWmQjoz ]Contribute $5

The more we raise now, the better our chances of electing more
working-class leaders next year!

In solidarity,

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Cryptocurrency is back with a vengeance, Peter. The crypto lobby accounted for almost half of all political donations in the 2024 election cycle, spending big on both Republicans and corporate Democrats. Crypto executives, companies, investors, and super PACs gave tens of millions to Donald Trump alone. Why? To buy political influence, prevent regulation that protects consumers, and maximize their profits. And it’s already working. Trump appointed pro-crypto hedge fund manager Scott Bessent to lead the Treasury Department, and last week, he signed an executive order promoting crypto and exploring a national stockpile, promising to de-regulate it even further. Trump’s crypto and artificial intelligence czar, venture capitalist David Sacks, declared “The war on crypto is over.” Not only that, but Trump himself is trying to profit off of the crypto industry while in office, launching the sale of his own meme coin, a volatile product that could cause economic harm to the consumers he’s selling it to. It’s his latest way of trying to profit off of his presidency and rip off everyday people. It’s not just Republicans like Trump propping up crypto in exchange for campaign contributions: many establishment Democrats including the incoming leader of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand have taken money from this industry and support legislation to protect it from appropriate regulation. [ ]This is exactly why we need more working-class progressives in Congress committed to standing up to the crypto industry. Will you support our 2026 candidate recruitment efforts with a grassroots donation of $5 today? [ ]Contribute $5 The more we raise now, the better our chances of electing more working-class leaders next year! In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie!
**Peter, have you seen this?! A BREAKING NEW poll shows this Governor’s race is neck-and-neck.**
**The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250126-8737&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8737%2E614464%2EImNwjw)
**[SUPPORT ABIGAIL](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250126-8737&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8737%2E614464%2EImNwjw)**
While it’s still early, this confirms what we’ve always known: this will be a close race. Back in 2021, Republican Gov. Youngkin won by less than two points, and the polls were tight all the way up until Election Day. Now, this poll shows us well within the margin of error.
Given these numbers, we’re gearing up for another highly competitive and hard-fought election in November. And all eyes will be on Virginia, meaning we’ve got to deliver. That’s why we’re building a strong campaign infrastructure now, so we’re ready for anything that comes our way.
**We know this race will get national attention and with that comes outside money for our opponent, so we must build the momentum and groundwork now for a winning campaign.[So, can we count on you to support Abigail’s campaign and Heartland Patriots to flip this critical seat blue in November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250126-8737&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8737%2E614464%2EImNwjw)**

clean_body: The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie! Peter, have you seen this?! A BREAKING NEW poll shows this Governor’s race is neck-and-neck. The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie! While it’s still early, this confirms what we’ve always known: this will be a close race. Back in 2021, Republican Gov. Youngkin won by less than two points, and the polls were tight all the way up until Election Day. Now, this poll shows us well within the margin of error. Given these numbers, we’re gearing up for another highly competitive and hard-fought election in November. And all eyes will be on Virginia, meaning we’ve got to deliver. That’s why we’re building a strong campaign infrastructure now, so we’re ready for anything that comes our way. We know this race will get national attention and with that comes outside money for our opponent, so we must build the momentum and groundwork now for a winning campaign. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter,

I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 9 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 3pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, let me explain:

Raja is working night and day to:

-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
-- Protect our communities from gun violence
-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
-- And so much more

Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats.

Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you, TedRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

hey there, team — we’re rapidly approaching our first monthly deadline of 2025, so i had to reach out to you directly today.

did you know that on average last year folks were pitching in $22 or less to power our work?

we raised millions of dollars and were able to support democrats in every county not with big checks from billionaires, but from contributions from regular folks across the state.

we’ve got a lot of work to do this year and will have even more to do next year, so i have to ask: will you make a grassroots contribution of $22 (or whatever works for you) to support our team?

here’s a direct link to make a contribution: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-jan25?amount=3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-jan25?amount=3]

the second trump administration means that we’ll have to remain vigilant and prepared for whatever comes our way. we can’t do that without your support.

thanks 😁

benjamin nelson,
finance director, arizona democratic party

Earlier today, I emailed and texted you about our midnight deadline to break a fundraising RECORD in honor of Donald Trump’s return to the White House. I thought we’d see a SURGE of support from MAGA Republicans and top patriots following Donald Trump’s historic Inauguration. However, that couldn’t be further from the truth. We’re now about to fall short of our FIRST goal since Trump officially became the 47th President of the United States. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=6a3c0dd1a5f9938e559f8acf387f893879936bbc92f1be85c23041ce58c47efd226164eb6d14bc69f65e79336636e3ce38d204aa0f0e8a1344305f4ccacabdfa I’d really hate to end the week on such a bad note, so I’m hoping you can help me out before midnight. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=6a3c0dd1a5f9938e559f8acf387f893879936bbc92f1be85c23041ce58c47efd226164eb6d14bc69f65e79336636e3ce38d204aa0f0e8a1344305f4ccacabdfa HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD Right now, we’re pacing to only raise 82% of our goal, so I’m emailing my top supporters and those who I know are true supporters of Donald Trump to make up the final 18% we need to raise. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=6a3c0dd1a5f9938e559f8acf387f893879936bbc92f1be85c23041ce58c47efd226164eb6d14bc69f65e79336636e3ce38d204aa0f0e8a1344305f4ccacabdfa Even just $5, $10, or $15 will help us inch closer to our goal, Peter. Can we count on you? This is a perfect opportunity for MAGA patriots nationwide to rally and show a united grassroots movement in support of the new Trump Administration. I really hate to put you on the spot like this, but we can’t come up short of our first critical fundraising goal following Trump’s historic inauguration. Doing so would be a HUGE setback for our new Republican TRIFECTA and President Trump’s agenda! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=6a3c0dd1a5f9938e559f8acf387f893879936bbc92f1be85c23041ce58c47efd226164eb6d14bc69f65e79336636e3ce38d204aa0f0e8a1344305f4ccacabdfa HELP BREAK A MAGA FUNDRAISING RECORD I know you won’t let this happen, so I’m asking…no I’m pleading with you to do what I know will be no small favor: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=6a3c0dd1a5f9938e559f8acf387f893879936bbc92f1be85c23041ce58c47efd226164eb6d14bc69f65e79336636e3ce38d204aa0f0e8a1344305f4ccacabdfa Will you click this link to pitch in even just a few bucks before our deadline? body:
[1]Powered By People

So much has happened this last week—Trump issued a flurry of disastrous
executive orders on his first day in office.

We knew our rights and freedoms would be on the line under a second Trump
administration.

Thankfully, the ACLU has already sued the Trump administration just hours
after he issued an order to end birthright citizenship (which is
constitutionally protected).

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

# **EP95: The Golden Age Is Here**
On Monday, January 20th, 2025, Donald J. Trump took his second oath of office, becoming the 47th President of the United States. In doing so, he joined Grover Cleveland as the only other President in American history to serve non-consecutive terms. Trump's return to office comes with a sweeping electoral mandate, secured through a decisive victory over Kamala Harris in November. Americans gathered in Washington DC for the inauguration festivities and what was a monumental day in American history.
The inauguration is a day steeped in tradition and ceremony. Since George Washington took the first oath of office in 1789 on the balcony of Federal Hall in New York City, the event has symbolized the peaceful transfer of power and the will of the American people. Originally held in March, inaugurations were delayed to allow the President-elect time to travel to Washington--a daunting task in earlier times. Andrew Jackson, for example, endured a grueling three-week journey from Tennessee in 1829, traveling by steamboat up the Ohio River and by carriage from Pittsburgh to the capital.
Today's inaugurations, now held on January 20th, have evolved into highly choreographed events filled with formal celebrations, solemn transitions, and grand public spectacles.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pFAaJMeHwcwNLm_r0k2nMwGwq-1SWA2QslwAjLkPWvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154838522)
After taking office on Monday, President Donald J. Trump wasted no time implementing his America First agenda. In a whirlwind day, Trump signed over 200 executive orders that have already begun to transform the federal government and chart a bold new course for the nation--in what he is calling the dawn of a new "Golden Age." While there's much to celebrate if you're a MAGA patriot or a staunch conservative, we must remain vigilant. These victories are just the beginning, and there are troubling developments lurking in the shadows.
Let's start with the most pivotal orders released so far.
**Immigration Policy:
**President Trump wasted no time addressing the crisis at the southern border. Declaring a state of emergency, he has reinstated the "Remain in Mexico" policy, requiring anyone seeking residency to await approval outside the U.S. He also directed contractors to resume construction of the border wall, a cornerstone of his first administration. To bolster border security, Trump deployed the National Guard, Coast Guard, and active-duty military units. Additionally, this order paves the way for ICE to conduct large-scale raids and deportations across the country.
This decisive action was long overdue, and the American people overwhelmingly support it. Polls consistently show that the majority of citizens want ALL illegal immigrants deported. President Trump's swift action demonstrates his commitment to delivering on his campaign promises.
**Ending Birthright Citizenship:**
Another groundbreaking order targets the controversial practice of birthright citizenship. Last week, while previewing what the first week of this administration would look like, I mentioned that the United States is one of the few nations in the world that has such a policy. It is antiquated, dating back to Reconstruction as a means to force the South to treat Blacks as citizens. Now, in 2025, it is used for the practice of "birth tourism." There are literally thousands of pregnant women each year who pay big bucks to get to America just to give birth to their child. Again, under the current reading of the 14th Amendment, anyone born here-regardless of who their parents are-immediately become citizens. Trump has ended this. As expected, the ACLU and a handful of states have already sued over this change.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pFAaJMeHwcwNLm_r0k2nMwGwq-1SWA2QslwAjLkPWvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154838522)
**January 6th Pardons:**
Among the most critical and controversial order signed on Monday was one that officially pardoned and commuted the sentences of ALL the January 6th prisoners. For the past four years, hundreds of American patriots have been political prisoners in their own nation. During this time, they were subject to incessant government investigation, harsh sentences, and mistreatment by D.C. prison guards. The Biden administration was effectively operating a gulag in the nation's capital. For the past several weeks, it was unclear just how many J6'ers would be freed, if any at all. Fortunately, President Trump delivered beyond what anyone expected on this. Perhaps Joe Biden's unprecedented preemptive pardons of his family and government goons like Anthony Fauci gave Trump the room to politically maneuver on this. And while we will hear whining and moaning from RINO's and Dems over freeing the protestors, it was absolutely the right thing to do. These people had their lives destroyed. They were the victims of a political witch hunt, much in the same way that Trump has been.
**Ending DEI and Gender Theory Initiatives:**
One of the most transformative orders directed federal agencies to eliminate all Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI), gender theory, and affirmative action programs--effective immediately. Over the past two decades, these policies have undermined core American values, promoting division instead of unity. This began in earnest during the Obama years, slowed under Trump's first term, and returned to full strength under Biden. Now it would seem that Trump is adamant about ridding it, permanently. DEI rests on the idea that if something is too "White" or "masculine" it is inherently bad. Anytime a leftist uses the term "diversity," what they really mean is "non-White." Not only is any such policy racist towards Whites, but it flies against the idea of a meritocracy that America has functioned on for a century.
Even more insidious is the spread of gender theory ideology, which claims that gender is a fluid spectrum. This radical agenda has led to the normalization of extreme measures, including irreversible gender reassignment surgeries for children. Such policies, often forced upon the public by the Obama and Biden administrations, have infiltrated nearly every corner of government, from the State Department to the military. Trump's decisive action to dismantle these programs is a long-overdue correction.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pFAaJMeHwcwNLm_r0k2nMwGwq-1SWA2QslwAjLkPWvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154838522)
These are only a handful of the 200-some executive orders signed in the past 100 hours. Any conservative should be absolutely ecstatic about what they are seeing. President Trump has already delivered on many of his key campaign promises, and it appears his second administration has already found its footing. These orders-and the personnel enforcing them-appear serious, which was sometimes lacking during the first admin. If Trump can maintain a focused, loyal staff around him, then he will transform this nation for the better. But there is cause for concern.
There is a specter now haunting 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. Its presence can be felt behind many of these executive orders, in the staffing of many of the agencies, and in the advice being given to Trump. I am, of course, talking about the new "tech-right" clique that has manifested over the past few months. Elon is perhaps the most prominent face of this. On one hand, his support was instrumental in getting Trump elected. On the other hand, he advocates for mass-legal immigration through abusing the H-1B Visa system and bans people from X who disagree.
But there are other characters in this clique as well. Take Larry Ellison, the billionaire owner of Oracle-a tech company-who has carefully embedded himself near the President. Ellison, who is also one of Musk's closest friends, will be a leading member of Trump's new $500 Billion AI collaboration project, dubbed Stargate. Ellison has previously advocated for using AI to create a mass surveillance state that would make China's President Xi and Foucault both blush.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pFAaJMeHwcwNLm_r0k2nMwGwq-1SWA2QslwAjLkPWvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154838522)
The influence of this Big Tech rebrand would not be so concerning had they always been MAGA supporters. However, that is not the case. The vast majority of these people-including Elon-only hitched their wagons to the Trump train a few months ago. None of these people supported Trump when he ran in 2016, when he was President, or in the wake of the 2020 stolen election. They are here now because it is financially and politically expedient. They cannot, and should not, be trusted.
Otherwise, I think it is safe to say the second Trump administration is off to a fantastic start. The real test will come in the next few weeks as the left begins to push back against many of the executive orders and plans that Trump has put into movement. Will this admin be able to overcome the hurdles that caused the first admin to stumble? Will Trump be able to truly bring about mass deportations? Will he be able to end the conflict in Russia and bring lasting peace to the Middle East?
Time will tell.
Monday was a monumental moment for the American people and for the MAGA movement. What is not conveyed in all the pomp and circumstance is just how amazing Donald Trump's journey has been. Take a moment to think about everything that transpired since he descended the golden escalators of Trump tower almost a decade ago. An earth shattering victory in 2016, an administration that rebuilt our economy and standing in the world despite constant opposition, a stolen election in 2020, the January 6th protest, abandonment from party leadership, a political rebirth, several near assassinations, and a sweeping victory this past November. Were it not happening in real time, before our very eyes, no one would believe the story of Donald J. Trump and his miraculous come back.
Yet here we stand, on the brink of a new chapter in American history. For the MAGA movement and the good people of this nation, Monday was more than just an inauguration--it was a celebration of resilience, perseverance, and the power of belief, and the power of a movement's loyalty.

Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! WATCH THIS FULL EPISODE OF LOOMER UNLEASHED ON RUMBLE HERE: EP95: The Golden Age Is Here On Monday, January 20th, 2025, Donald J. Trump took his second oath of office, becoming the 47th President of the United States. In doing so, he joined Grover Cleveland as the only other President in American history to serve non-consecutive terms. Trump's return to office comes with a sweeping electoral mandate, secured through a decisive victory over Kamala Harris in November. Americans gathered in Washington DC for the inauguration festivities and what was a monumental day in American history. The inauguration is a day steeped in tradition and ceremony. Since George Washington took the first oath of office in 1789 on the balcony of Federal Hall in New York City, the event has symbolized the peaceful transfer of power and the will of the American people. Originally held in March, inaugurations were delayed to allow the President-elect time to travel to Washington--a daunting task in earlier times. Andrew Jackson, for example, endured a grueling three-week journey from Tennessee in 1829, traveling by steamboat up the Ohio River and by carriage from Pittsburgh to the capital. Today's inaugurations, now held on January 20th, have evolved into highly choreographed events filled with formal celebrations, solemn transitions, and grand public spectacles. After taking office on Monday, President Donald J. Trump wasted no time implementing his America First agenda. In a whirlwind day, Trump signed over 200 executive orders that have already begun to transform the federal government and chart a bold new course for the nation--in what he is calling the dawn of a new "Golden Age." While there's much to celebrate if you're a MAGA patriot or a staunch conservative, we must remain vigilant. These victories are just the beginning, and there are troubling developments lurking in the shadows. Let's start with the most pivotal orders released so far. Immigration Policy: President Trump wasted no time addressing the crisis at the southern border. Declaring a state of emergency, he has reinstated the "Remain in Mexico" policy, requiring anyone seeking residency to await approval outside the U.S. He also directed contractors to resume construction of the border wall, a cornerstone of his first administration. To bolster border security, Trump deployed the National Guard, Coast Guard, and active-duty military units. Additionally, this order paves the way for ICE to conduct large-scale raids and deportations across the country. This decisive action was long overdue, and the American people overwhelmingly support it. Polls consistently show that the majority of citizens want ALL illegal immigrants deported. President Trump's swift action demonstrates his commitment to delivering on his campaign promises. Ending Birthright Citizenship: Another groundbreaking order targets the controversial practice of birthright citizenship. Last week, while previewing what the first week of this administration would look like, I mentioned that the United States is one of the few nations in the world that has such a policy. It is antiquated, dating back to Reconstruction as a means to force the South to treat Blacks as citizens. Now, in 2025, it is used for the practice of "birth tourism." There are literally thousands of pregnant women each year who pay big bucks to get to America just to give birth to their child. Again, under the current reading of the 14th Amendment, anyone born here-regardless of who their parents are-immediately become citizens. Trump has ended this. As expected, the ACLU and a handful of states have already sued over this change. January 6th Pardons: Among the most critical and controversial order signed on Monday was one that officially pardoned and commuted the sentences of ALL the January 6th prisoners. For the past four years, hundreds of American patriots have been political prisoners in their own nation. During this time, they were subject to incessant government investigation, harsh sentences, and mistreatment by D.C. prison guards. The Biden administration was effectively operating a gulag in the nation's capital. For the past several weeks, it was unclear just how many J6'ers would be freed, if any at all. Fortunately, President Trump delivered beyond what anyone expected on this. Perhaps Joe Biden's unprecedented preemptive pardons of his family and government goons like Anthony Fauci gave Trump the room to politically maneuver on this. And while we will hear whining and moaning from RINO's and Dems over freeing the protestors, it was absolutely the right thing to do. These people had their lives destroyed. They were the victims of a political witch hunt, much in the same way that Trump has been. Ending DEI and Gender Theory Initiatives: One of the most transformative orders directed federal agencies to eliminate all Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI), gender theory, and affirmative action programs--effective immediately. Over the past two decades, these policies have undermined core American values, promoting division instead of unity. This began in earnest during the Obama years, slowed under Trump's first term, and returned to full strength under Biden. Now it would seem that Trump is adamant about ridding it, permanently. DEI rests on the idea that if something is too "White" or "masculine" it is inherently bad. Anytime a leftist uses the term "diversity," what they really mean is "non-White." Not only is any such policy racist towards Whites, but it flies against the idea of a meritocracy that America has functioned on for a century. Even more insidious is the spread of gender theory ideology, which claims that gender is a fluid spectrum. This radical agenda has led to the normalization of extreme measures, including irreversible gender reassignment surgeries for children. Such policies, often forced upon the public by the Obama and Biden administrations, have infiltrated nearly every corner of government, from the State Department to the military. Trump's decisive action to dismantle these programs is a long-overdue correction. LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. These are only a handful of the 200-some executive orders signed in the past 100 hours. Any conservative should be absolutely ecstatic about what they are seeing. President Trump has already delivered on many of his key campaign promises, and it appears his second administration has already found its footing. These orders-and the personnel enforcing them-appear serious, which was sometimes lacking during the first admin. If Trump can maintain a focused, loyal staff around him, then he will transform this nation for the better. But there is cause for concern. There is a specter now haunting 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. Its presence can be felt behind many of these executive orders, in the staffing of many of the agencies, and in the advice being given to Trump. I am, of course, talking about the new "tech-right" clique that has manifested over the past few months. Elon is perhaps the most prominent face of this. On one hand, his support was instrumental in getting Trump elected. On the other hand, he advocates for mass-legal immigration through abusing the H-1B Visa system and bans people from X who disagree. But there are other characters in this clique as well. Take Larry Ellison, the billionaire owner of Oracle-a tech company-who has carefully embedded himself near the President. Ellison, who is also one of Musk's closest friends, will be a leading member of Trump's new $500 Billion AI collaboration project, dubbed Stargate. Ellison has previously advocated for using AI to create a mass surveillance state that would make China's President Xi and Foucault both blush. The influence of this Big Tech rebrand would not be so concerning had they always been MAGA supporters. However, that is not the case. The vast majority of these people-including Elon-only hitched their wagons to the Trump train a few months ago. None of these people supported Trump when he ran in 2016, when he was President, or in the wake of the 2020 stolen election. They are here now because it is financially and politically expedient. They cannot, and should not, be trusted. Otherwise, I think it is safe to say the second Trump administration is off to a fantastic start. The real test will come in the next few weeks as the left begins to push back against many of the executive orders and plans that Trump has put into movement. Will this admin be able to overcome the hurdles that caused the first admin to stumble? Will Trump be able to truly bring about mass deportations? Will he be able to end the conflict in Russia and bring lasting peace to the Middle East? Time will tell. Monday was a monumental moment for the American people and for the MAGA movement. What is not conveyed in all the pomp and circumstance is just how amazing Donald Trump's journey has been. Take a moment to think about everything that transpired since he descended the golden escalators of Trump tower almost a decade ago. An earth shattering victory in 2016, an administration that rebuilt our economy and standing in the world despite constant opposition, a stolen election in 2020, the January 6th protest, abandonment from party leadership, a political rebirth, several near assassinations, and a sweeping victory this past November. Were it not happening in real time, before our very eyes, no one would believe the story of Donald J. Trump and his miraculous come back. Yet here we stand, on the brink of a new chapter in American history. For the MAGA movement and the good people of this nation, Monday was more than just an inauguration--it was a celebration of resilience, perseverance, and the power of belief, and the power of a movement's loyalty. name: Team Kelly
subject: 🚀 To ALL of Mark Kelly’s supporters: Please, don’t click away 🧑‍🚀
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't just the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#

When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't just the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark is serving in the United States Senate — holding the line against President Trump, standing in the breach against the worst that this administration is trying to do.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that important group.
---

Mark’s average online donation is around $30. Most people chip in much less than that. But with President Trump granting immunity to January 6 rioters, attacking the Constitution, and undermining the foundations of our democracy, it truly matters that you’re backing Mark as he fights MAGA extremism.
We’ll put it right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he is not going to back down.
---

[**If that sounds good to you, please: We’re humbly asking that you chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan25.ChccGr&refcode=em250126-1-f&t=1&akid=5951%2E6688874%2EmBi16I)

Because of you, Mark is serving in the United States Senate — holding the line against President Trump, standing in the breach against the worst that this administration is trying to do. But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work. Today, we’re asking you to join that important group. Mark’s average online donation is around $30. Most people chip in much less than that. But with President Trump granting immunity to January 6 rioters, attacking the Constitution, and undermining the foundations of our democracy, it truly matters that you’re backing Mark as he fights MAGA extremism. We’ll put it right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he is not going to back down. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | | | | | | | ** It is absolutely critical that this team stays united. That’s how we’ll fight back, and that’s how we’ll get through this. Together. Thank you, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c403ebb8f6d44d11a89e4bc84d7ba778&_e=AVozOJ70RryXCPZXd4G6H5k9hZzInDwfy-jHNtTamG4UpzKuXfogRMFCztVvAf4RBjuAm6_mutMf2W-6nycJybf6XIPbBdchV-qID3vr6Hmqwv4EmyTxHOV2Exr80FjVjnqRbY31tTRfHXRTG72JFnj3F5pqGNTH8DUeMT3m1etKkfygFTKhmxMijAEYNLzbng-bCfJuo-zGQGznvhtyuDZ1PG3kDCePs4EWOhr3B75bYQxohSOgXDfObJCJA3COEQIaS9zDqiZOnSy5jzz96mhzDkpsjxnSwYk-lt-SLEP_TKEjIzdfrFl0dK15AClMMNB_BkKq9CXPbSYndhRTiA%3D%3D)

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn our hearts and minds back to God
body:
| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6409a188ba5a42dea3b3fb85f8d5117d&_e=PvKJ7BizAesqpURlxKFPg_Ft7A4l0YPrbXnHrlnDki1pKKaAtz5xmKPMmOwyx63ReUtCaO0PhyWubw30CYyiSsXKwWnvg_WcbK7Hq7S9ORJuhjxlT4RBn84UP4fn_OKowCqMS2HeAt33dNZ4DtjjcDFmNMBs-PWZrCLsz-lmySFn6rPto6X77DTZBaVSN2ng8Bu9t_LaSdlN1BCO7HoQNDDBE-UavX5CGBDYflfVF6WkLr1jign7j4bwA_E8D_88wrkW_7gaCQfgxeEYSSTSQIgOpx8UecAKaYzWGI8RRENUcVR8ruKqsQneLkj8517aZaNIjqceELAZXKxA-9K6a4cZz0lbeO9EynDpLm79xRt3TWgYaulBkr3iWjYvOtY3)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
Just look at what parents have already said about S _aving the Easter Bunny_ :
---
"It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully."
---
— Lisa A.
---
"My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!"
---
– Bob A.
---
"My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts."
---
– Laurin
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6409a188ba5a42dea3b3fb85f8d5117d&_e=PvKJ7BizAesqpURlxKFPg_Ft7A4l0YPrbXnHrlnDki1pKKaAtz5xmKPMmOwyx63ReUtCaO0PhyWubw30CYyiSsXKwWnvg_WcbK7Hq7S9ORJuhjxlT4RBn84UP4fn_OKowCqMS2HeAt33dNZ4DtjjcDFmNMBs-PWZrCLsz-lmySFn6rPto6X77DTZBaVSN2ng8Bu9t_LaSdlN1BCO7HoQNDDBE-UavX5CGBDYflfVF6UNrg2RSa3-Z-KNJ7097Sy4uSu992TRO3DUfQepwG0dxPvcm3xPjwMzR5y2PwHK2FbphqF6Qcr7SPfdToCW4deqyYXbobmBuqMGjVMBObu6SjoRAp08MZFjfzQoIcVII-sfntNH_rbIuzihXRf7HXQ3)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. clean_body: | | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... | | | | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. Just look at what parents have already said about S aving the Easter Bunny : "It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully." — Lisa A. "My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!" – Bob A. "My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts." – Laurin And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. It's only January but Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive 12-week "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.

body:
Now that our GOP trifecta is off to the races, it's time for Americans to set the agenda.
Complete your Speaker’s Survey today
|
---
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=39e341f19bd447dd843be53e2222a46a&_e=YkJwbvkIOsUI5O-Z8RDiFwTGbcyJNSjzUUgZa8RS5L2DiYXLY7Mh8E-mMCLpTgQiycBvgDqkvkrI7SUTgcuYRjLZMQKhVioR8wyXesEOwt3QLerXES2paR3iOPKoFWmdNgGGD15PZ-fxGLvtpZ1bjBK5n2bxGJIwS_Fs_A8zCYKHJe8CaQXhA-Nbd3ZSaqdk8J3aXkB1Z7nit3ZFJ-uV-zC8sUrmgp4EvHeGvra4XISps5KhCrWN58dqGrHyW1pBFLYdfwkJN00ooA2p9GDoZNKsIswhozXj9htVmhoEhNX6VYS52HJo9NGsRH3kOrpmNT1ywJ1yk6frbcIWR_nG4VzoReLU_MegAPmL8VEz7IAAuvMUqmCPYnjmsjirdK__sUGkta76NVnrFMUgc24rHA%3D%3D "Speaker's Survey")

Friend,

America's golden age is here.

And a new year and a new government means a fresh start, _and a new Speaker 's Survey._

That's right \- now that our GOP trifecta is off to the races, it's time for Americans to set the agenda.

**[Complete the Speaker's Survey today and be one of the FIRST responses my team lays eyes on.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=39e341f19bd447dd843be53e2222a46a&_e=YkJwbvkIOsUI5O-Z8RDiFwTGbcyJNSjzUUgZa8RS5L2DiYXLY7Mh8E-mMCLpTgQiycBvgDqkvkrI7SUTgcuYRjLZMQKhVioR8wyXesEOwt3QLerXES2paR3iOPKoFWmdNgGGD15PZ-fxGLvtpZ1bjBK5n2bxGJIwS_Fs_A8zCYKHJe8CaQXhA-Nbd3ZSaqdk8J3aXkB1Z7nit3ZFJ-uV-zC8sUrmgp4EvHeGvra4XISps5KhCrWN58dqGrHyW1pBBRevAFXyC8gA3szxyRsGqIiAdxxd9GJathLZvlQ8z4utatY4D_tuEAKhZJ2zUcgyWAIIQGVaNOn-YuttpdvJBmdvjaRnHlC3VIdck-lqZ1fWM5ehKqq58ecMWu1zJ5Tk_vW5F9po1tvwcW3GvtmoAA%3D%3D "Complete the Speaker’s Survey today and be one of the FIRST responses my team lays eyes on.")**

---
| | [COMPLETE SPEAKER'S SURVEY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=39e341f19bd447dd843be53e2222a46a&_e=YkJwbvkIOsUI5O-Z8RDiFwTGbcyJNSjzUUgZa8RS5L2DiYXLY7Mh8E-mMCLpTgQiycBvgDqkvkrI7SUTgcuYRjLZMQKhVioR8wyXesEOwt3QLerXES2paR3iOPKoFWmdNgGGD15PZ-fxGLvtpZ1bjBK5n2bxGJIwS_Fs_A8zCYKHJe8CaQXhA-Nbd3ZSaqdk8J3aXkB1Z7nit3ZFJ-uV-zC8sUrmgp4EvHeGvra4XISps5KhCrWN58dqGrHyW1pB9TYzZWe3_P6XkwHWjoAX_hJnRODdCMF0PtOtARn3GyV-bJsJb94dKOqUc-HCD9HPFXXYyRsO94cdQNOw63z2D5ihjIQ1Vpio5tCWaEhq5SHOjuD58FiV4k4lsjfhQqs7Wpjzx-uiRQfERrnfEvv07Q%3D%3D "COMPLETE SPEAKER’S SURVEY")

Make no mistake about it, Friend, there is a LOT of work to be done if we're to undo all the harm Joe Biden has done and get our country back on track.

_**And these first 100 days are PIVOTAL.**_

Which is why my team and I have issued the Speaker's Survey- to see what the American people have to say on all the important issues of the day. **[Can I ask you to complete this important Survey today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=39e341f19bd447dd843be53e2222a46a&_e=YkJwbvkIOsUI5O-Z8RDiFwTGbcyJNSjzUUgZa8RS5L2DiYXLY7Mh8E-mMCLpTgQiycBvgDqkvkrI7SUTgcuYRjLZMQKhVioR8wyXesEOwt3QLerXES2paR3iOPKoFWmdNgGGD15PZ-fxGLvtpZ1bjBK5n2bxGJIwS_Fs_A8zCYKHJe8CaQXhA-Nbd3ZSaqdk8J3aXkB1Z7nit3ZFJ-uV-zC8sUrmgp4EvHeGvra4XISps5KhCrWN58dqGrHyW1pBjfePVioaHvkX6UE6NHOs5VOAY1lwqcaoCv6Sw-CCiUy5XFhsnkcWgjoyy-Ki0bRjJI_tca93dBhhCXy1rNSPx9mEWbTh3Ml8MNuV6AJVvjkUONRc0KQybSCmBc8HImH4ZxgwwaxkcqXWE_4cDg13nw%3D%3D "Can I ask you to complete this important Survey today?")**

---
| | [COMPLETE SPEAKER'S SURVEY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=39e341f19bd447dd843be53e2222a46a&_e=YkJwbvkIOsUI5O-Z8RDiFwTGbcyJNSjzUUgZa8RS5L2DiYXLY7Mh8E-mMCLpTgQiycBvgDqkvkrI7SUTgcuYRjLZMQKhVioR8wyXesEOwt3QLerXES2paR3iOPKoFWmdNgGGD15PZ-fxGLvtpZ1bjBK5n2bxGJIwS_Fs_A8zCYKHJe8CaQXhA-Nbd3ZSaqdk8J3aXkB1Z7nit3ZFJ-uV-zC8sUrmgp4EvHeGvra4XISps5KhCrWN58dqGrHyW1pBtjHs7s-PpgirKoJ2zgm3_srWDVMkYXjJnyso51GVp6z4utU8iHuIis1Q6ZJ9PngzLnnRZSl_XPj94c3Ucp1l791mjJQ8x60IMjtN_zFaKguDjpG27WyzE-eQBdkESkmjb6aeb-H747_S-bUUmGw5AQ%3D%3D "COMPLETE SPEAKER’S SURVEY")

Speaker Mike Johnson

# [New Yorker SHUTS UP CNN Dems whining about Trump's J6 pardons](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=155790561&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NzkwNTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc5MzEwODYsImV4cCI6MTc0MDUyMzA4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iEBbcMEu_FcWQS4sF-qrX5hIm0xXFgaiKrpTyX5a3d8)
### "I won't cede an inch of the moral high ground on that issue to anybody who represents the Democrat party!!"
Jan 26
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=155790561&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NzkwNTYxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNzkzMTA4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzQwNTIzMDg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AqJCiCxbpARtQwju-1Xfai5XgDdty0E2I1IPzLcK_YI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=155790561&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NzkwNTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc5MzEwODYsImV4cCI6MTc0MDUyMzA4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iEBbcMEu_FcWQS4sF-qrX5hIm0xXFgaiKrpTyX5a3d8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=155790561&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NzkwNTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc5MzEwODYsImV4cCI6MTc0MDUyMzA4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iEBbcMEu_FcWQS4sF-qrX5hIm0xXFgaiKrpTyX5a3d8)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9saXRpYnJhd2wvcC9uZXcteW9ya2VyLXNodXRzLXVwLWNubi1kZW1zLXdoaW5pbmc_.3vf3z0eZeSSLUzxieZbFmfihengT_irWnnvmlV5WNq4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/new-yorker-shuts-up-cnn-dems-whining?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

New York City Councilman Joseph Borelli **[called out CNN host Abby Phillip for expressing moral outrage](https://substack.com/redirect/8d431a61-ad40-45f9-81e0-dcb24e92c3c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Trump's January 6 pardons while the democrats passively supported Antifa and BLM rioters in 2020.
"I won't cede an inch of the moral high ground on that issue to anybody who represents the Democrat party!" Borelli told Phillip. "You could have seen all summer NYC police officers getting assaulted and beaten,... and the Democratic Party doesn't say boo!!"
**[Watch the fiery live exchange below:](https://substack.com/redirect/8d431a61-ad40-45f9-81e0-dcb24e92c3c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8d431a61-ad40-45f9-81e0-dcb24e92c3c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Borelli hammered home the blaring hypocrisy from democrats who turned a blind eye or even gave support while violent rioters targeted police and local businesses in the name of vengeance for George Floyd, as well as the left's general soft on crime position which seems to be out of step with their hard crackdown on the J6ers.

# Jesse Watters WRECKS Jessica Tarlov for trying to defend Gavin Newsom from Trump name calling
Fox News host Jesse Watters **[destroyed his liberal cohost Jessica Tarlov](https://substack.com/redirect/045f3ad9-39f0-4063-9414-d2d0f7ce53b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to defend California Governor Gavin Newsom from Trump's blunt personal attacks.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/045f3ad9-39f0-4063-9414-d2d0f7ce53b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tarlov brought up Trump's "Newscum" nickname for the democrat governor.
"No one cares what he calls him Jessica, the state is on fire!" Watters snapped. "They don't have water!"
"They're trying to send water from the north to the south, and they're suing them to stop it because of a fish no one eats Jessica, that's all we're saying..." Watters continued.
